source: Toby acquiesced; and they hurried through the main street of the little town, which at that late hour was wholly deserted. A dim light shone at intervals from some bed-room window; and the hoarse barking of dogs occasionally broke the silence of the night. But there was nobody abroad. They had cleared the town, as the church-bell struck two.
domestication: 托比点头同意了；两人加快脚步穿过小镇的主街，这会儿街上已经空无一人。偶尔从某家卧室的窗户里透出昏暗的光亮，夜里的寂静不时被远处的狗吠声打破。但路上见不到半个行人。他们刚出镇子，教堂的钟声就敲响了两下。
foreignization: 托比默认了；他们匆匆穿过小镇的主街，此时已夜深人静，整个街道空无一人。偶尔有微弱的灯光从某些卧室窗户透出；夜的寂静不时被狗的低沉吠声打破。但街上没有行人。当教堂的钟声敲响两点时，他们已经离开了镇子。

They had cleared the town, as the church-bell struck two.

source: Mr. Bumble had re-counted the teaspoons, re-weighed the sugar-tongs, made a closer inspection of the milk-pot, and ascertained to a nicety the exact condition of the furniture, down to the very horse-hair seats of the chairs; and had repeated each process full half a dozen times; before he began to think that it was time for Mrs. Corney to return. Thinking begets thinking; as there were no sounds of Mrs. Corney’s approach, it occured to Mr. Bumble that it would be an innocent and virtuous way of spending the time, if he were further to allay his curiousity by a cursory glance at the interior of Mrs. Corney’s chest of drawers.
domestication: 班布尔先生数了一遍又一遍茶匙，称了又称糖夹，仔细检查了奶壶，连椅子上的马毛坐垫都没放过，把家具的状态摸得一清二楚。这些事情他反反复复做了六七遍，才开始琢磨科尼太太该回来了。左思右想之间，见外面一点动静也没有，班布尔先生心想，要是再随便翻一翻科尼太太的抽屉，消磨消磨时间，打发打发好奇，倒也是一件无伤大雅的事。
foreignization: 班布尔先生重新数了茶匙，重新称了糖夹的重量，对奶壶进行了更仔细的检查，并精确地确定了家具的状况，直到椅子上的马鬃坐垫；并且每项程序都重复了不下六次；他才开始觉得该是科尼太太回来的时候了。思考引人深思；由于没有听到科尼太太回来的声音，班布尔先生想到，如果他再粗略地看一下科尼太太的抽屉柜内部，以进一步减轻他的好奇心，那将是一种无辜而美德的方式来消磨时间。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Bumble had re-counted the teaspoons, re-weighed the sugar-tongs, made a closer inspection of the milk-pot, and ascertained to a nicety the exact condition of the furniture, down to the very horse-hair seats of the chairs; and had repeated each process full half a dozen times; before he began to think that it was time for Mrs. Corney to return. Thinking begets thinking; as there were no sounds of Mrs. Corney’s approach, it occured to Mr. Bumble that it would be an innocent and virtuous way of spending the time, if he were further to allay his curiousity by a cursory glance at the interior of Mrs. Corney’s chest of drawers.

source: “If that had been the case, Harry,” said Mrs. Maylie, “I fear your happiness would have been effectually blighted, and that your arrival here, a day sooner or a day later, would have been of very, very little import.”
domestication: 要是真那样的话，哈利，梅利太太说，我怕你的幸福早就泡汤了，你早来一天晚来一天也就没什么两样了。

source: “You ought to be dead; positively dead with the fright,” said the fat gentleman. “Why didn’t you send? Bless me, my man should have come in a minute; and so would I; and my assistant would have been delighted; or anybody, I’m sure, under such circumstances. Dear, dear! So unexpected! In the silence of the night, too!”
domestication: “你这吓得应该半死才对，”胖先生说，“你为什么不派人来叫我呢？我的天，我那手下立马就能到；我自己也能马上赶到；我的助手肯定也乐意来帮忙；换作任何人，在这种情况下都会这么做。哎呀，真是太出乎意料了！还偏偏挑在夜深人静的时候！”
foreignization: “你本该死了；吓得完全没命了，”胖绅士说。“为什么你不派人来？天哪，我的仆人会马上过来的；我也会来的；我的助手也会非常乐意来的；或者任何人，我相信，在这种情况下都会来的。哎呀，哎呀！太出乎意料了！还在夜深人静的时候！”

In the silence of the night, too!”

source: “You needn’t mind sending up to me, if the child cries, nurse,” said the surgeon, putting on his gloves with great deliberation. “It’s very likely it will be troublesome. domestication: “孩子要是哭闹，不用顾忌，尽管送上来，护士。”外科医生边说边慢条斯理地戴上手套。“这孩子可能挺难伺候的。要是真这样，就给他点稀饭喝。”他戴好帽子，走到门口时，在床边停了一下，又说：“她长得很标致，是从哪儿来的？”
foreignization: “如果孩子哭了，你不必担心送到我这里来，护士，”外科医生一边小心翼翼地戴着手套一边说。“很可能它会很麻烦。如果是这样，给它一点粥吃。”他戴上帽子，在走向门口的途中在床边停了下来，补充道，“她也是一个漂亮的女孩；她是从哪里来的？”

source: “No, no,” said Mrs. Sowerberry: bethinking herself of Oliver’s old friend. “Run to Mr. Bumble, Noah, and tell him to come here directly, and not to lose a minute; never mind your cap! Make haste! You can hold a knife to that black eye, as you run along. It’ll keep the swelling down.”
domestication: “不行，不行，”索尔伯里太太想了想奥利弗的老朋友，说道，“诺亚，你快去叫邦布尔先生，让他马上过来，一刻也别耽误！帽子就别管了，快去！你路上可以用刀子按着那只黑眼圈，这样能消肿。”

source: The street-door was opened. Oliver ran one way; and the girl ran another; and Mrs. Bedwin stood on the step and screamed for the boy; but there was no boy in sight. Oliver and the girl returned, in a breathless state, to report that there were no tidings of him.
domestication: 大门一开，奥利弗撒腿就跑；那女孩也往另一边跑去；贝德温太太站在台阶上大声喊着找那男孩，可哪还有他的影子。奥利弗和那女孩气喘吁吁地回来，说是一点消息也没有。

source: “Then, if your lot had been differently cast,” rejoined Rose; “if you had been even a little, but not so far, above me; if I could have been a help and comfort to you in any humble scene of peace and retirement, and not a blot and drawback in ambitious and distinguished crowds; I should have been spared this trial. I have every reason to be happy, very happy, now; but then, Harry, I own I should have been happier.”
domestication: 罗斯接着说：“要是你的命运不同一些呢；要是你比我稍稍高一点，但又不是那么高；要是我能给你平淡宁静的生活带来帮助和安慰，而不是在你那些有抱负、显赫的社交圈里成为你的负担和拖累；那我就能免去这番煎熬了。我现在有理由感到幸福，非常幸福；可话又说回来，哈里，我承认那时我会更幸福。”
foreignization: “那么，如果你的命运有所不同，”罗丝回答说；“如果你的位置即使比我高一点，但不是高那么多；如果我能在某个宁静的、平凡的场景中成为你的帮助和慰藉，而不是在你那些雄心勃勃、出类拔萃的社交圈里成为一个污点和拖累；我就不会经历这样的考验了。我现在有充分的理由感到幸福，非常幸福；但是，哈里，我承认那时我会更幸福。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I have every reason to be happy, very happy, now; but then, Harry, I own I should have been happier.”

I have every reason to be happy, very happy, now; but then, Harry, I own I should have been happier.”

source: All the windows in the rear of the house had been long ago bricked up, except one small trap in the room where the boy was locked, and that was too small even for the passage of his body. But, from this aperture, he had never ceased to call on those without, to guard the back; and thus, when the murderer emerged at last on the house-top by the door in the roof, a loud shout proclaimed the fact to those in front, who immediately began to pour round, pressing upon each other in an unbroken stream.
domestication: 屋后除了关男孩的那间房里留了个小窗口，其余的窗户早都被砖封死了，这个窗口连他的身子都钻不过去。但男孩从这小口子一直朝外喊，叫外面的人留心后头。所以当杀人犯最后从屋顶的门爬到房顶上时，屋前的人立刻听到一声大喊，知道那人出来了，于是大家纷纷涌过来，挤成了一股不断的洪流。
foreignization: 房子后部的所有窗户很久以前都已经被砖封死了，只有一个小孩被锁的房间还留有一个小洞口，但这个洞口甚至太小，无法让他通过身体。但是，从这个孔洞中，他从未停止向外面的人呼救，让他们守在后面；因此，当凶手最终通过屋顶的门出现在房顶时，一声大喊将这一事实告知了前面的人，他们立刻开始蜂拥而至，相互挤压着形成了一股不断的人流。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

All the windows in the rear of the house had been long ago bricked up, except one small trap in the room where the boy was locked, and that was too small even for the passage of his body. But, from this aperture, he had never ceased to call on those without, to guard the back; and thus, when the murderer emerged at last on the house-top by the door in the roof, a loud shout proclaimed the fact to those in front, who immediately began to pour round, pressing upon each other in an unbroken stream.

source: He hurried off, and walked till he almost dropped upon the ground; then lay down in a lane, and had a long, but broken and uneasy sleep. He wandered on again, irresolute and undecided, and oppressed with the fear of another solitary night.
domestication: 他急急忙忙地走了，走得腿都快软了，然后倒在一条小路上，睡了个断断续续、不安稳的长觉。他又开始漫无目的地走着，心里七上八下的，害怕又要度过一个孤零零的夜晚。
foreignization: 他匆匆离去，一直走到几乎要倒在地上；然后躺在一条小路上，睡了一个漫长但断断续续、不安稳的觉。他又继续漫无目的地走着，犹豫不决，心中充满对另一个孤独夜晚的恐惧。

source: Mr. Dawkins received these handsome compliments with much philosophy, and offered to cut any gentleman in company, for the first picture-card, at a shilling at a time. Nobody accepting the challenge, and his pipe being by this time smoked out, he proceeded to amuse himself by sketching a ground-plan of Newgate on the table with the piece of chalk which had served him in lieu of counters; whistling, meantime, with peculiar shrillness.
domestication: 达金斯先生听了这些恭维话，倒也泰然自若，还提出愿意和在座的任何一位先生玩纸牌游戏，赢了就给一张画片，每局一先令。可谁也没接招，他的烟斗也抽得差不多了，便自个儿找乐子，用之前当筹码用的粉笔在桌子上勾勒起纽盖特监狱的平面图来，嘴里还吹着异常尖厉的口哨。
foreignization: 达金斯先生以哲学的态度接受了这些美好的恭维，并提出以每次一先令的价格，为在场的任何一位绅士画第一张图画牌。由于没有人接受挑战，而且他的烟斗这时也已经抽完了，他便用那块曾代替筹码使用的粉笔，在桌子上勾画纽盖特的地平面图来自娱；同时，他吹着特别尖锐的口哨。

source: “This is all mighty fine,” said Monks (to retain his assumed designation) after a long silence, during which he had jerked himself in sullen defiance to and fro, and Mr. Brownlow had sat, shading his face with his hand. “But what do you want with me?”
domestication: “这事儿真是了不得，”蒙克斯在长时间的沉默后开口说道。他一直闷着头，倔强地来回扭动身体，而布朗洛先生则用手遮着脸坐着。“但你们找我到底有什么事？”
foreignization: “这都很好，”蒙克斯（保留他所假设的称呼）在长时间的沉默后说道，在这段时间里，他曾愤怒地来回扭动身体，而布朗洛先生则一直用手遮着脸坐着。“但是你们想从我这里得到什么？”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“This is all mighty fine,” said Monks (to retain his assumed designation) after a long silence, during which he had jerked himself in sullen defiance to and fro, and Mr. Brownlow had sat, shading his face with his hand. “But what do you want with me?”
“这事儿真是了不得，”蒙克斯在长时间的沉默后开口说道。他一直闷着头，倔强地来回扭动身体，而布朗洛先生则用手遮着脸坐着。“但你们找我到底有什么事？”

“This is all mighty fine,” said Monks (to retain his assumed designation) after a long silence, during which he had jerked himself in sullen defiance to and fro, and Mr. Brownlow had sat, shading his face with his hand. “But what do you want with me?”
“这都很好，”蒙克斯（保留他所假设的称呼）在长时间的沉默后说道，在这段时间里，他曾愤怒地来回扭动身体，而布朗洛先生则一直用手遮着脸坐着。“但是你们想从我这里得到什么？”

source: It was nine o’clock at night, when the man, quite tired out, and the dog, limping and lame from the unaccustomed exercise, turned down the hill by the church of the quiet village, and plodding along the little street, crept into a small public-house, whose scanty light had guided them to the spot. There was a fire in the tap-room, and some country-labourers were drinking before it.
domestication: 夜幕降临，已经九点了。那人累得精疲力尽，那只狗也因为不习惯的运动瘸着腿。他们沿着村里的小路，穿过教堂旁的山坡，慢慢走进了一家昏暗的小酒馆。就是这点微弱的灯光引他们到了这里。屋里炉火正旺，几个农夫正围着火喝酒聊天。
foreignization: 那是晚上九点钟，那人已经非常疲倦，那狗因为不习惯的运动而一瘸一拐，他们从安静村庄的教堂旁的小山转下来，沿着小街慢慢走着，爬进了一家灯光昏暗的小酒馆，正是这微弱的光线引导他们来到这里。屋子里的酒吧间里生着火，一些乡下劳工正围坐在火前喝酒。

source: “You must do more than that,” said Mr. Brownlow. “Make restitution to an innocent and unoffending child, for such he is, although the offspring of a guilty and most miserable love. You have not forgotten the provisions of the will. Carry them into execution so far as your brother is concerned, and then go where you please. In this world you need meet no more.”
domestication: 布朗洛先生说：“你得做的不止这些。要补偿这个无辜又没招谁的孩子，虽然他的出生源于一段有罪且痛苦的爱情。你不会忘了遗嘱里的条款吧。按照遗嘱对你弟弟的部分执行吧，之后你想去哪儿都行。从此以后，咱们井水不犯河水。”
foreignization: “你必须做得更多，”布朗洛先生说。“向一个无辜无罪的孩子作出赔偿，因为尽管他是出于一种有罪且极其不幸的爱情的产物，他确实是这样的。你没有忘记遗嘱中的条款。在涉及你弟弟的部分上执行它们，然后你可以随意去任何地方。在这个世界上，你们不必再见面。”

source: “Oh ah! I’ll come on,” replied the Dodger, brushing his hat with the palm of his hand. “Ah! (to the Bench) it’s no use your looking frightened; I won’t show you no mercy, not a ha’porth of it. You’ll pay for this, my fine fellers. I wouldn’t be you for something! I wouldn’t go free, now, if you was to fall down on your knees and ask me. Here, carry me off to prison! Take me away!”
domestication: “哦，来就来！”机灵鬼用掌心拍了拍帽子，回应道。“嘿！（对着法官）你们吓成这样也没用，我可不会手下留情，半点都不会。你们得为这事儿付出代价，我的好老兄们。别说是一点小恩小惠了，就算给我金山银山，我也不愿做你们这种人！现在，就算你们跪下来求我放我一马，我都不干。来吧，带我去坐牢！快把我带走！”
foreignization: “哦啊！我会来的，”多德杰回答说，用手掌拍了拍他的帽子。“啊！（对法官）你们装害怕也没用；我不会手下留情的，连半便士的同情都不会有。你们会为此付出代价的，我的好家伙们。我可不愿意成为你们。现在即使你们跪下来求我，我也不会放了你们。来吧，把我带走进监狱！把我带走吧！”

source: He looked about, and saw that at no great distance there was a house, which perhaps he could reach. Pitying his condition, they might have compassion on him; and if they did not, it would be better, he thought, to die near human beings, than in the lonely open fields. He summoned up all his strength for one last trial, and bent his faltering steps towards it.
domestication: 他环顾四周，发现不远处有一座房子，或许能赶到那里。看他这般狼狈，人家也许会可怜他；即便不怜悯，他也觉得死在有人的地方总比孤零零地倒在旷野里强。于是，他鼓足了最后一丝力气，蹒跚着向那房子走去。
foreignization: 他四下张望，看到不远处有一座房子，也许他能够到达。怜悯他的处境，他们可能会同情他；如果他们不同情，他认为，与其在孤寂的旷野中死去，不如死在离人近的地方。他鼓足了最后的力气，蹒跚地向那里走去。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He looked about, and saw that at no great distance there was a house, which perhaps he could reach. Pitying his condition, they might have compassion on him; and if they did not, it would be better, he thought, to die near human beings, than in the lonely open fields. He summoned up all his strength for one last trial, and bent his faltering steps towards it.

source: “Thank Heaven upon your knees, dear lady,” cried the girl, “that you had friends to care for and keep you in your childhood, and that you were never in the midst of cold and hunger, and riot and drunkenness, and—and—something worse than all—as I have been from my cradle. I may use the word, for the alley and the gutter were mine, as they will be my deathbed.”
domestication: 姑娘喊道：“亲爱的女士，您得跪下来感谢上天，幸亏您小时候有朋友照顾，从没经历过饥寒交迫、醉生梦死，还有比这更糟的事情——我从出生起就一直在这样的环境中。这话我说得没错，因为从小到大，我就是在巷子和阴沟里摸爬滚打，将来恐怕也得在那儿咽气。”
foreignization: “亲爱的女士，您要跪下来感谢上天，”女孩喊道，“感谢您在童年时有朋友照顾和保护您，感谢您从未处在寒冷和饥饿之中，从未处在暴乱和醉酒之中，还有——还有——比这一切更糟糕的事情——而我从摇篮起就一直在这样的环境中。我可以使用这个词，因为小巷和阴沟是我的世界，也将成为我的死亡之地。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Thank Heaven upon your knees, dear lady,” cried the girl, “that you had friends to care for and keep you in your childhood, and that you were never in the midst of cold and hunger, and riot and drunkenness, and—and—something worse than all—as I have been from my cradle. I may use the word, for the alley and the gutter were mine, as they will be my deathbed.”
姑娘喊道：“亲爱的女士，您得跪下来感谢上天，幸亏您小时候有朋友照顾，从没经历过饥寒交迫、醉生梦死，还有比这更糟的事情——我从出生起就一直在这样的环境中。这话我说得没错，因为从小到大，我就是在巷子和阴沟里摸爬滚打，将来恐怕也得在那儿咽气。”

I may use the word, for the alley and the gutter were mine, as they will be my deathbed.”

source: “The short and the long of what you mean,” said Nancy: speaking very emphatically, and slightly frowning at Oliver as if to bespeak his serious attention to her words: “is, that if you’re crossed by him in this job you have on hand, you’ll prevent his ever telling tales afterwards, by shooting him through the head, and will take your chance of swinging for it, as you do for a great many other things in the way of business, every month of your life.”
domestication: 南希说话时语气很重，还微微皱着眉头盯着奥利弗，似乎在提醒他要认真听她的话：“你这意思是，如果这次的事被他搅黄了，你就一枪崩了他，让他永远没机会告密，然后你就等着上绞刑架吧，就像你每个月做那些违法生意时一样，随时都可能完蛋。”
foreignization: “你这话的短长，”南希说道，语气非常坚定，并且稍微皱着眉头看着奥利弗，好像在要求他认真听她的话：“就是，如果你在这手上的活儿里被他作梗，你会通过朝他的脑袋开枪来阻止他以后告密，并且会冒着为此上绞架的风险去做这件事，就像你每个月都会为了许多其他生意上的事情冒这个险一样。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“The short and the long of what you mean,” said Nancy: speaking very emphatically, and slightly frowning at Oliver as if to bespeak his serious attention to her words: “is, that if you’re crossed by him in this job you have on hand, you’ll prevent his ever telling tales afterwards, by shooting him through the head, and will take your chance of swinging for it, as you do for a great many other things in the way of business, every month of your life.”
南希说话时语气很重，还微微皱着眉头盯着奥利弗，似乎在提醒他要认真听她的话：“你这意思是，如果这次的事被他搅黄了，你就一枪崩了他，让他永远没机会告密，然后你就等着上绞刑架吧，就像你每个月做那些违法生意时一样，随时都可能完蛋。”

“你这话的短长，”南希说道，语气非常坚定，并且稍微皱着眉头看着奥利弗，好像在要求他认真听她的话：“就是，如果你在这手上的活儿里被他作梗，你会通过朝他的脑袋开枪来阻止他以后告密，并且会冒着为此上绞架的风险去做这件事，就像你每个月都会为了许多其他生意上的事情冒这个险一样。”

source: Oliver leaned his head upon his hand when the old man disappeared, and pondered, with a trembling heart, on the words he had just heard. The more he thought of the Jew’s admonition, the more he was at a loss to divine its real purpose and meaning.
domestication: 老先生一走，奥利弗就用手托着头，心里直打鼓，反复琢磨刚才听到的话。越想越糊涂，越想越不明白那犹太老头的告诫到底是什么意思。
foreignization: 奥利弗在老人消失后把手托着头，心惊胆战地思索着他刚才听到的话。他越想犹太人的告诫，就越弄不清它的真正目的和含义。

Oliver leaned his head upon his hand when the old man disappeared, and pondered, with a trembling heart, on the words he had just heard. The more he thought of the Jew’s admonition, the more he was at a loss to divine its real purpose and meaning.

Oliver leaned his head upon his hand when the old man disappeared, and pondered, with a trembling heart, on the words he had just heard. The more he thought of the Jew’s admonition, the more he was at a loss to divine its real purpose and meaning.
奥利弗在老人消失后把手托着头，心惊胆战地思索着他刚才听到的话。他越想犹太人的告诫，就越弄不清它的真正目的和含义。

source: “Do me the favour, my dear young lady, to leave entirely out of the question that goodness and benevolence of which you speak, and of which nobody else knows anything; and if you have it in your power to produce any evidence which will alter the unfavourable opinion I was once induced to entertain of that poor child, in Heaven’s name put me in possession of it.”
domestication: 好心的小姐啊，你所说的那些善良和仁慈，别人根本不知道，就别提了；如果你有本事拿出能改变我当初对那可怜孩子不利看法的证据，看在老天的份上，赶紧拿出来吧。
foreignization: “我亲爱的年轻女士，请你行个好，完全不要提到你所说的那种善意和仁慈，别人谁都不知道；如果你有能力提供任何能够改变我曾经对那个可怜的孩子产生的不利看法的证据，看在老天的份上，让我知道吧。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: On their way to the magistrate, Mr. Bumble instructed Oliver that all he would have to do, would be to look very happy, and say, when the gentleman asked him if he wanted to be apprenticed, that he should like it very much indeed; both of which injunctions Oliver promised to obey: the rather as Mr. Bumble threw in a gentle hint, that if he failed in either particular, there was no telling what would be done to him. When they arrived at the office, he was shut up in a little room by himself, and admonished by Mr. Bumble to stay there, until he came back to fetch him.
domestication: 在去见官老爷的路上，邦布尔先生嘱咐奥利弗，只要他表现得非常开心，等那位大人问他愿不愿意当学徒时，就说他非常乐意。奥利弗答应了，尤其因为邦布尔先生轻声提醒他，要是做不到这两点，后果不堪设想。到了衙门，奥利弗被单独关进一间小屋，邦布尔先生告诫他，一定要待在里面，等他回来再带他出去。
foreignization: 在去见官吏的路上，邦布尔先生指示奥利弗，他所要做的就是看起来非常高兴，当那位先生问他是否愿意当学徒时，要说他非常愿意；奥利弗答应遵守这两条指令：尤其是邦布尔先生轻声暗示，如果他在任何一个方面失败了，不知道会对他做什么。当他们到达办公室时，他被关在一个小房间里，邦布尔先生嘱咐他待在那里，直到回来接他。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On their way to the magistrate, Mr. Bumble instructed Oliver that all he would have to do, would be to look very happy, and say, when the gentleman asked him if he wanted to be apprenticed, that he should like it very much indeed; both of which injunctions Oliver promised to obey: the rather as Mr. Bumble threw in a gentle hint, that if he failed in either particular, there was no telling what would be done to him. When they arrived at the office, he was shut up in a little room by himself, and admonished by Mr. Bumble to stay there, until he came back to fetch him.
在去见官老爷的路上，邦布尔先生嘱咐奥利弗，只要他表现得非常开心，等那位大人问他愿不愿意当学徒时，就说他非常乐意。奥利弗答应了，尤其因为邦布尔先生轻声提醒他，要是做不到这两点，后果不堪设想。到了衙门，奥利弗被单独关进一间小屋，邦布尔先生告诫他，一定要待在里面，等他回来再带他出去。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On their way to the magistrate, Mr. Bumble instructed Oliver that all he would have to do, would be to look very happy, and say, when the gentleman asked him if he wanted to be apprenticed, that he should like it very much indeed; both of which injunctions Oliver promised to obey: the rather as Mr. Bumble threw in a gentle hint, that if he failed in either particular, there was no telling what would be done to him. When they arrived at the office, he was shut up in a little room by himself, and admonished by Mr. Bumble to stay there, until he came back to fetch him.
在去见官吏的路上，邦布尔先生指示奥利弗，他所要做的就是看起来非常高兴，当那位先生问他是否愿意当学徒时，要说他非常愿意；奥利弗答应遵守这两条指令：尤其是邦布尔先生轻声暗示，如果他在任何一个方面失败了，不知道会对他做什么。当他们到达办公室时，他被关在一个小房间里，邦布尔先生嘱咐他待在那里，直到回来接他。

source: The gas-lamps were lighted; Mrs. Bedwin was waiting anxiously at the open door; the servant had run up the street twenty times to see if there were any traces of Oliver; and still the two old gentlemen sat, perseveringly, in the dark parlour, with the watch between them.
domestication: 煤气灯已经点亮了；贝德温太太焦急地守在敞开的门口；仆人已经跑到街上二十多次，看看有没有奥利弗的踪影；而那两位老先生却依然坐在昏暗的客厅里，耐心地等着，表就放在他们中间。
foreignization: 煤气灯已经点亮；贝德温太太焦急地在敞开的门口等候；仆人已经跑到街上二十次去看是否有奥利弗的踪迹；而那两位老先生仍然坚持坐在黑暗的客厅里，怀表放在他们中间。

source: “It was, when you heerd it, sir,” rejoined Mr. Giles; “but, at this time, it had a busting sound. I turned down the clothes”; continued Giles, rolling back the table-cloth, “sat up in bed; and listened.”
domestication: “您听的时候是那样，先生，”吉尔斯先生接茬道；“可眼下听着就像要炸锅了。我把被子掀开，”吉尔斯边说边卷起桌布，“坐起来，竖起耳朵听。”
foreignization: “当你听到它时，先生，”吉尔斯先生回答说；“但在这个时候，它发出了爆裂的声音。我掀开被子”；吉尔斯继续说道，卷起桌布，“坐在床上；听着。”

source: “Poor Bet! She went to see the Body, to speak to who it was,” replied Chitling, his countenance falling more and more, “and went off mad, screaming and raving, and beating her head against the boards; so they put a strait-weskut on her and took her to the hospital—and there she is.”
domestication: 可怜的贝特！她去看了那具尸体，想跟死者说话，结果疯了，又叫又闹，还用头撞墙板。他们给她穿上紧身衣，送到医院去了——现在还在那儿呢。
foreignization: 可怜的贝特！她去看了那具尸体，想和它是谁说话，”奇特林回答，他的脸色越来越难看，“然后她疯了，尖叫着，怒骂着，用头撞木板；所以他们给她穿上了紧身衣，把她送到了医院——她现在就在那里。

source: Monks, still bearing that assumed name, retired with his portion to a distant part of the New World; where, having quickly squandered it, he once more fell into his old courses, and, after undergoing a long confinement for some fresh act of fraud and knavery, at length sunk under an attack of his old disorder, and died in prison. As far from home, died the chief remaining members of his friend Fagin’s gang.
domestication: 僧人依旧顶着那个假名，带着分得的钱财远走新大陆；不久便挥霍一空，重操旧业。后来因再次行骗作奸，被关进监狱多年，最终因旧病复发，在狱中咽了气。远离故土，他朋友费金那帮人的主要成员也相继死去。
foreignization: 僧侣们，仍然使用那个假名，带着他们的那份钱财退隐到了新世界的偏远地区；在那里，他们很快挥霍一空，再次重操旧业，并在因新的欺诈和恶行而长期监禁后，最终因旧病复发，在监狱中死去。远离家乡，他的朋友费金团伙的其他主要成员也相继死去。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

As far from home, died the chief remaining members of his friend Fagin’s gang.

source: Noah looked eagerly about him for the Dodger; but although there were several women who would have done very well for that distinguished character’s mother or sister, and more than one man who might be supposed to bear a strong resemblance to his father, nobody at all answering the description given him of Mr. Dawkins was to be seen. He waited in a state of much suspense and uncertainty until the women, being committed for trial, went flaunting out; and then was quickly relieved by the appearance of another prisoner who he felt at once could be no other than the object of his visit.
domestication: 诺亚急切地四下张望，寻找那个机灵鬼；虽然有几个女人看起来很像那个大人物的妈妈或姐姐，也有几个男人长相酷似他爸爸，但就是不见道金斯先生的影子。他提心吊胆地等着，直到那些女人被带走，才松了口气。这时，另一个犯人走了进来，诺亚一眼就认出，这人必定是他要找的目标无疑。
foreignization: 诺亚急切地四下张望寻找那个机灵鬼；虽然有几个女人很适合作那位杰出人物的母亲或姐妹，而且不止一个男人可能被认为与他的父亲极为相似，但根本没有人符合对他描述的达金斯先生的样子。他在极度的悬疑和不确定中等待，直到那些被提交审判的女人轻佻地走出去；然后，另一个犯人的出现迅速让他放松下来，他立刻感觉到这个人除了他此行的目标外不可能是别人。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Noah looked eagerly about him for the Dodger; but although there were several women who would have done very well for that distinguished character’s mother or sister, and more than one man who might be supposed to bear a strong resemblance to his father, nobody at all answering the description given him of Mr. Dawkins was to be seen. He waited in a state of much suspense and uncertainty until the women, being committed for trial, went flaunting out; and then was quickly relieved by the appearance of another prisoner who he felt at once could be no other than the object of his visit.
诺亚急切地四下张望，寻找那个机灵鬼；虽然有几个女人看起来很像那个大人物的妈妈或姐姐，也有几个男人长相酷似他爸爸，但就是不见道金斯先生的影子。他提心吊胆地等着，直到那些女人被带走，才松了口气。这时，另一个犯人走了进来，诺亚一眼就认出，这人必定是他要找的目标无疑。

source: The attendant did as she was told: shaking her head meanwhile, to intimate that the woman would not die so easily; having done so, she resumed her seat by the side of the other nurse, who had by this time returned. The mistress, with an expression of impatience, wrapped herself in her shawl, and sat at the foot of the bed.
domestication: 仆人照吩咐的做了：一边摇头，意思是这女人没那么容易死；做完这些，她又坐回了另一个刚回来的护士旁边。女主人不耐烦地裹紧了披肩，坐在了床脚。
foreignization: 仆人照她说的做了：同时摇了摇头，暗示那个女人不会那么容易死；做完这些后，她重新坐到了另一位已经回来的护士旁边。女主人带着不耐烦的表情，披上斗篷，坐在了床脚。

source: When they had sat in silence for some time, the two old women rose from the bed, and crouching over the fire, held out their withered hands to catch the heat. The flame threw a ghastly light on their shrivelled faces, and made their ugliness appear terrible, as, in this position, they began to converse in a low voice.
domestication: 两人沉默了许久，终于，两位老妇人从床上起身，弓着腰凑到火堆旁，伸出枯槁的手去感受那微弱的暖意。火光映照在她们皱巴巴的脸上，显得格外恐怖。就在这时，她们压低声音，开始窃窃私语起来。
foreignization: 当她们沉默地坐了片刻之后，两个老妇人从床上起身，蹲在火边，伸出她们干瘪的手去感受热量。火焰投射出一种可怕的光芒，照在她们枯萎的脸上，使她们的丑陋显得更加恐怖，就在这时，她们开始低声交谈。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When they had sat in silence for some time, the two old women rose from the bed, and crouching over the fire, held out their withered hands to catch the heat. The flame threw a ghastly light on their shrivelled faces, and made their ugliness appear terrible, as, in this position, they began to converse in a low voice.

source: “And so you are resolved to be my travelling companion this morning; eh?” said the doctor, as Harry Maylie joined him and Oliver at the breakfast-table. “Why, you are not in the same mind or intention two half-hours together!”
domestication: “你今早打定主意要跟我一块儿出门了；是吧？”医生说着，哈里·梅利加入了他和奥利弗的早餐桌。“你这人啊，一会儿一个主意，真是让人摸不透！”
foreignization: “那么你决定今天早上做我的旅行伙伴了；嗯？”医生说道，哈利·梅利加入他和奥利弗在早餐桌旁时。“为什么，你半个小时之内就会改变主意或想法！”

source: It is worthy of remark, as illustrating the importance we attach to our own judgments, and the pride with which we put forth our most rash and hasty conclusions, that, although Mr. Grimwig was not by any means a bad-hearted man, and though he would have been unfeignedly sorry to see his respected friend duped and deceived, he really did most earnestly and strongly hope at that moment, that Oliver Twist might not come back.
domestication: 值得留意的是，这事儿充分说明了我们多么看重自己的判断，以及我们有多么自豪地抛出那些轻率仓促的结论。虽说格林威格先生绝非心肠歹毒之人，而且他若是看到自己尊敬的朋友被骗，心里也会真真切切地难过。但说来奇怪，就在这当口，他心里还真是在暗暗期盼着奥利弗·特威斯特别回来。
foreignization: 值得注意的是，这说明了我们对自己判断的重视程度，以及我们在提出最鲁莽和仓促的结论时所表现出的自豪感，尽管格里姆威格先生绝不是一个坏心肠的人，而且如果看到他尊敬的朋友被骗，他会真心感到难过，但在那一刻，他确实非常强烈地希望奥利弗·特威斯特不会回来。

source: There was another, and a darker object, to be gained. Sikes knew too much, and his ruffian taunts had not galled Fagin the less, because the wounds were hidden. The girl must know, well, that if she shook him off, she could never be safe from his fury, and that it would be surely wreaked—to the maiming of limbs, or perhaps the loss of life—on the object of her more recent fancy.
domestication: 还有个更阴暗的目的要达到。西克斯知道得太多，他的恶言恶语虽然表面没让费金多生气，但心里的伤口却在隐隐作痛。这姑娘必须明白，要是想甩掉他，就永远别想逃出他的报复；到头来，她新欢的肢体可能残缺，甚至搭上性命。
foreignization: 还有一个更为阴暗的目的需要达成。西克斯知道得太多了，他这个恶棍的嘲讽不仅没有因为伤口隐藏而减少对费金的刺激。女孩必须明白，如果她甩掉他，她将永远无法摆脱他的怒火，而这种怒火肯定会发泄在她最近的新欢身上，可能会致残，甚至夺命。

source: “Listen then! You!” returned Monks. “His father being taken ill at Rome, was joined by his wife, my mother, from whom he had been long separated, who went from Paris and took me with her—to look after his property, for what I know, for she had no great affection for him, nor he for her. He knew nothing of us, for his senses were gone, and he slumbered on till next day, when he died. Among the papers in his desk, were two, dated on the night his illness first came on, directed to yourself”; he addressed himself to Mr. Brownlow; “and enclosed in a few short lines to you, with an intimation on the cover of the package that it was not to be forwarded till after he was dead. One of these papers was a letter to this girl Agnes; the other a will.”
domestication: 你听着！你！蒙克斯回道。她是我妈，他的妻子，从巴黎过来，带着我——说是为了照看他的财产，谁知道呢，反正她并不怎么喜欢他，他也不待见她。他病得厉害，什么都不知道了，睡了一天，人就没了。在他的书桌里，有两张纸，是他发病那天晚上写的，还写了几句话让你收，信封上还写着要等他死后才能寄出。一张是给这姑娘阿格尼丝的信，另一张是遗嘱。
foreignization: 听好了！你！”蒙克斯回答道。“他的父亲在罗马病倒后，与他的妻子，我的母亲团聚了，他们已经分居很久了，她从巴黎去了，并且带上了我——可能是为了照顾他的财产，谁知道呢，因为她对他并没有多大的感情，他也不喜欢她。他对我们的存在一无所知，因为那时他已经神志不清，昏睡了一天，然后就死了。在他的书桌文件中，有两份文件，日期是他在发病当晚写的，寄给你的”；他转向布朗洛先生说道；“并附有一封简短的信给你，信封上注明在他人去世后才能转交。其中一份文件是写给这个叫艾格尼丝的女孩的信；另一份则是遗嘱。”

Among the papers in his desk, were two, dated on the night his illness first came on, directed to yourself”; he addressed himself to Mr. Brownlow; “and enclosed in a few short lines to you, with an intimation on the cover of the package that it was not to be forwarded till after he was dead. One of these papers was a letter to this girl Agnes; the other a will.”

source: The events narrated in the last chapter were yet but two days old, when Oliver found himself, at three o’clock in the afternoon, in a travelling-carriage rolling fast towards his native town. Mrs. Maylie, and Rose, and Mrs. Bedwin, and the good doctor were with him: and Mr. Brownlow followed in a post-chaise, accompanied by one other person whose name had not been mentioned.
domestication: 上一章讲的事情才过去两天，奥利弗就在下午三点发现自己坐上了前往老家的马车，车轮滚滚向前。梅利太太、罗丝、贝德温太太和那位好心的医生都陪在他身边，布朗洛先生则跟着一个没提名字的人坐邮车紧随其后。
foreignization: 上一章所述的事件发生后仅仅两天，奥利弗就在下午三点发现自己坐上了前往他故乡的马车。梅利夫人、罗斯、贝德温太太和那位好医生都与他同在：布朗洛先生则乘坐邮车跟随其后，陪同的还有另一位未被提及名字的人。

“Come, come, Sikes,” said the Jew appealing to him in a remonstratory tone, and motioning towards the boys, who were eagerly attentive to all that passed; “we must have civil words; civil words, Bill.”
“来，来，西克斯，”犹太人用劝说的语气对他说，并向那些热切关注着一切动静的男孩们示意；“我们必须和和气气说话；和和气气说话，比尔。”

source: It was the critical moment of Oliver’s fate. If the inkstand had been where the old gentleman thought it was, he would have dipped his pen into it, and signed the indentures, and Oliver would have been straightway hurried off. But, as it chanced to be immediately under his nose, it followed, as a matter of course, that he looked all over his desk for it, without finding it; and happening in the course of his search to look straight before him, his gaze encountered the pale and terrified face of Oliver Twist: who, despite all the admonitory looks and pinches of Bumble, was regarding the repulsive countenance of his future master, with a mingled expression of horror and fear, too palpable to be mistaken, even by a half-blind magistrate.
domestication: 这是决定奥利弗命运的紧要关头。要是墨水瓶在老先生以为的那个位置，他准会拿起笔来签合同，奥利弗也就被立即带走了。可偏偏那墨水瓶就在他鼻子底下，结果他翻遍了桌子也没找到，反而在寻找的过程中，直勾勾地对上了奥利弗·特威斯特那张苍白恐惧的脸。尽管邦布尔不断地使眼色、掐他，奥利弗还是死盯着未来主人那张讨厌的脸，那股子惊恐和害怕，就算是半瞎的法官也看得一清二楚。
foreignization: 这是奥利弗命运的关键时刻。如果墨水瓶在那位老先生认为它应该在的地方，他就会把笔蘸进墨水里，签好契约，奥利弗也就立刻会被带走。但偏偏它正好在他的鼻子底下，因此，他当然会在整个书桌上找它，却怎么也找不到；而在寻找的过程中，他碰巧直视前方，目光撞上了奥利弗·特威斯特那张苍白而惊恐的脸：尽管邦布尔不断地对他使眼色、掐他，奥利弗还是以一种混合着恐惧和厌恶的神情注视着他未来主人那张令人反感的脸，这种神情即使是一位半盲的治安法官也不会弄错。

It was the critical moment of Oliver’s fate. If the inkstand had been where the old gentleman thought it was, he would have dipped his pen into it, and signed the indentures, and Oliver would have been straightway hurried off. But, as it chanced to be immediately under his nose, it followed, as a matter of course, that he looked all over his desk for it, without finding it; and happening in the course of his search to look straight before him, his gaze encountered the pale and terrified face of Oliver Twist: who, despite all the admonitory looks and pinches of Bumble, was regarding the repulsive countenance of his future master, with a mingled expression of horror and fear, too palpable to be mistaken, even by a half-blind magistrate.

source: “My name, sir,” said the old gentleman, speaking like a gentleman, “my name, sir, is Brownlow. Permit me to inquire the name of the magistrate who offers a gratuitous and unprovoked insult to a respectable person, under the protection of the bench.” Saying this, Mr. Brownlow looked around the office as if in search of some person who would afford him the required information.
domestication: “先生，”老先生说道，说话的腔调像个绅士，“我叫布朗洛。我想问问，哪位法官无缘无故侮辱一位受法庭保护的体面人？”说完这话，布朗洛先生环视了一下办公室，好像在找能给他提供信息的人。

source: And so Oliver remained all that day, and for the greater part of many subsequent days, seeing nobody, between early morning and midnight, and left during the long hours to commune with his own thoughts. Which, never failing to revert to his kind friends, and the opinion they must long ago have formed of him, were sad indeed.
domestication: 于是，奥利弗就这样过了整整一天，之后的许多天里，大部分时间也都是这样。从早到晚，几乎直到深夜，他见不到任何人，长时间只能与自己的思绪作伴。这些思绪，总是回到那些善良的朋友身上，想到他们早已对他有了不好的看法，真是让人心酸。
foreignization: 因此，奥利弗在那天以及随后的许多天里，从清晨到午夜，几乎见不到任何人，在漫长的时光中，他只能与自己的思绪交流。而这些思绪，总是不可避免地回到他的善良朋友们身上，以及他们早已经对他形成的看法，确实令人悲伤。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

And so Oliver remained all that day, and for the greater part of many subsequent days, seeing nobody, between early morning and midnight, and left during the long hours to commune with his own thoughts. Which, never failing to revert to his kind friends, and the opinion they must long ago have formed of him, were sad indeed.
于是，奥利弗就这样过了整整一天，之后的许多天里，大部分时间也都是这样。从早到晚，几乎直到深夜，他见不到任何人，长时间只能与自己的思绪作伴。这些思绪，总是回到那些善良的朋友身上，想到他们早已对他有了不好的看法，真是让人心酸。

source: With these words, the matron dropped into her chair, and, once more resting her elbow on the table, thought of her solitary fate. The small teapot, and the single cup, had awakened in her mind sad recollections of Mr. Corney (who had not been dead more than five-and-twenty years); and she was overpowered.

source: “The boy’s right,” remarked Fagin, looking covertly round, and knitting his shaggy eyebrows into a hard knot. “You’re right, Oliver, you’re right; they will think you have stolen ’em. Ha! ha!” chuckled the Jew, rubbing his hands, “it couldn’t have happened better, if we had chosen our time!”
domestication: 这小子说得对，费金偷偷扫了一眼周围，浓眉一拧，打了个结。“你说得对，奥利弗，你说得对；他们准会以为是你偷的。哈哈！”老犹太搓着手，笑得阴险，“这要是咱们挑的时机，也没法子比这更好了！”
foreignization: “这男孩说得对，”费金边说边鬼鬼祟祟地环顾四周，将他那乱糟糟的眉毛拧成一个坚硬的结。“你说得对，奥利弗，你说得对；他们会以为是你偷的。哈！哈！”犹太人搓着手，得意地笑着说，“这要是我们挑时间干的话，也不可能发生得更好了！”

source: Oliver thought the old gentleman must be a decided miser to live in such a dirty place, with so many watches; but, thinking that perhaps his fondness for the Dodger and the other boys, cost him a good deal of money, he only cast a deferential look at the Jew, and asked if he might get up.
domestication: 奥利弗心想，这位老先生一定是个守财奴，不然怎么会住在这么脏的地方，还拥有那么多表；不过他又想，也许老先生对道奇和其他孩子们的喜爱花了不少钱，于是他只是恭敬地看了看犹太人，问能不能起来。
foreignization: 奥利弗认为老先生一定是个十足的吝啬鬼，才会住在这样一个肮脏的地方，有这么多表；但想到也许他对道奇和其他孩子的喜爱花了不少钱，他只是恭敬地看了犹太人一眼，问自己是否可以起身。

source: They walked onward, looking about them with the air of persons who entertained some very slight expectation which had little chance of being realised, when they were suddenly joined by this new associate. They halted with an exclamation of surprise, but suppressed it immediately; for a man in the garments of a countryman came close up—brushed against them, indeed—at that precise moment.
domestication: 他们继续往前走，四处张望，一副不太抱希望的样子，似乎没啥指望的事儿。突然，有个新伙伴加入了他们。他们惊讶地停下了脚步，但立刻又压下了这份惊讶；因为一个穿着乡下人衣服的汉子这时正好凑了上来，甚至擦肩而过。
foreignization: 他们继续前行，带着一副几乎不抱什么期望的样子，这些期望实现的可能性很小，这时突然有了一位新的同伴加入。他们惊讶地停下了脚步，但立刻抑制住了；因为一个穿着乡下人衣服的人在那一刻走近了——实际上还碰到了他们。

他们继续前行，带着一副几乎不抱什么期望的样子，这些期望实现的可能性很小，这时突然有了一位新的同伴加入。他们惊讶地停下了脚步，但立刻抑制住了；因为一个穿着乡下人衣服的人在那一刻走近了——实际上还碰到了他们。

source: Above stairs, the remainder of the evening passed cheerfully away; for the doctor was in high spirits; and however fatigued or thoughtful Harry Maylie might have been at first, he was not proof against the worthy gentleman’s good humour, which displayed itself in a great variety of sallies and professional recollections, and an abundance of small jokes, which struck Oliver as being the drollest things he had ever heard, and caused him to laugh proportionately; to the evident satisfaction of the doctor, who laughed immoderately at himself, and made Harry laugh almost as heartily, by the very force of sympathy. So, they were as pleasant a party as, under the circumstances, they could well have been; and it was late before they retired, with light and thankful hearts, to take that rest of which, after the doubt and suspense they had recently undergone, they stood much in need.
domestication: 楼上，余下的晚上过得欢天喜地的；医生那晚心情大好，无论哈利·梅利一开始有多疲惫或多心事重重，也抵挡不住这位正人君子的好兴致。他妙语连珠，讲了许多职业上的趣事，还开了不少小玩笑，这些在奥利弗听来是最逗趣的事儿了，笑得前俯后仰，医生自己更是笑得合不拢嘴，他的笑声也感染了哈利，让他笑得几乎喘不过气来。就这样，他们成了最和谐的一伙，直到夜深才带着轻松和感激的心情去休息，最近经历的种种疑虑和不安，让他们确实需要好好补一补。
foreignization: 楼上，晚上的其余时间愉快地度过了；因为医生情绪很高；不管哈里·梅利最初是多么疲倦或心事重重，他都无法抵挡这位可敬的先生的好心情，这种好心情表现在各种机智的言辞和职业回忆中，以及大量小笑话上，这些都让奥利弗觉得是他听过的最滑稽的事情，因此笑得不成样子；显然，这让医生非常满意，他自己也笑得不可抑制，并通过同情感化了哈里，使他几乎同样开心地笑了起来。所以，在这种情况下，他们是一个非常愉快的聚会；直到很晚，他们才怀着轻松和感激的心情去休息，这种休息对他们来说是非常需要的，因为他们最近经历了疑虑和不安。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Above stairs, the remainder of the evening passed cheerfully away; for the doctor was in high spirits; and however fatigued or thoughtful Harry Maylie might have been at first, he was not proof against the worthy gentleman’s good humour, which displayed itself in a great variety of sallies and professional recollections, and an abundance of small jokes, which struck Oliver as being the drollest things he had ever heard, and caused him to laugh proportionately; to the evident satisfaction of the doctor, who laughed immoderately at himself, and made Harry laugh almost as heartily, by the very force of sympathy. So, they were as pleasant a party as, under the circumstances, they could well have been; and it was late before they retired, with light and thankful hearts, to take that rest of which, after the doubt and suspense they had recently undergone, they stood much in need.

楼上，余下的晚上过得欢天喜地的；医生那晚心情大好，无论哈利·梅利一开始有多疲惫或多心事重重，也抵挡不住这位正人君子的好兴致。他妙语连珠，讲了许多职业上的趣事，还开了不少小玩笑，这些在奥利弗听来是最逗趣的事儿了，笑得前俯后仰，医生自己更是笑得合不拢嘴，他的笑声也感染了哈利，让他笑得几乎喘不过气来。就这样，他们成了最和谐的一伙，直到夜深才带着轻松和感激的心情去休息，最近经历的种种疑虑和不安，让他们确实需要好好补一补。

Above stairs, the remainder of the evening passed cheerfully away; for the doctor was in high spirits; and however fatigued or thoughtful Harry Maylie might have been at first, he was not proof against the worthy gentleman’s good humour, which displayed itself in a great variety of sallies and professional recollections, and an abundance of small jokes, which struck Oliver as being the drollest things he had ever heard, and caused him to laugh proportionately; to the evident satisfaction of the doctor, who laughed immoderately at himself, and made Harry laugh almost as heartily, by the very force of sympathy. So, they were as pleasant a party as, under the circumstances, they could well have been; and it was late before they retired, with light and thankful hearts, to take that rest of which, after the doubt and suspense they had recently undergone, they stood much in need.

楼上，晚上的其余时间愉快地度过了；因为医生情绪很高；不管哈里·梅利最初是多么疲倦或心事重重，他都无法抵挡这位可敬的先生的好心情，这种好心情表现在各种机智的言辞和职业回忆中，以及大量小笑话上，这些都让奥利弗觉得是他听过的最滑稽的事情，因此笑得不成样子；显然，这让医生非常满意，他自己也笑得不可抑制，并通过同情感化了哈里，使他几乎同样开心地笑了起来。所以，在这种情况下，他们是一个非常愉快的聚会；直到很晚，他们才怀着轻松和感激的心情去休息，这种休息对他们来说是非常需要的，因为他们最近经历了疑虑和不安。

source: He cast back a dark look, and a threatening motion of the hand, towards the spot where he had left the bolder villain; and went on his way: busying his bony hands in the folds of his tattered garment, which he wrenched tightly in his grasp, as though there were a hated enemy crushed with every motion of his fingers.
domestication: 他回头狠狠地瞪了一眼，还挥了挥手，似乎在警告留在那里的那个更胆大的坏蛋；然后继续赶路。他枯瘦的双手在破烂的衣服里忙个不停，紧紧地攥着布料，好像每动一下手指，都在碾压一个他深恶痛绝的敌人。
foreignization: 他向留下那个更胆大妄为的恶棍的地方投去一道阴郁的目光，并做出威胁的手势，然后继续上路：他那双骨瘦如柴的手在破烂的衣物褶皱中忙碌着，紧紧地抓握着，仿佛每动一下手指都在碾压一个深恶痛绝的敌人。

source: “No”; said Mr. Bumble approvingly; “no, you could not. You are a humane woman, Mrs. Mann.” (Here she set down the glass.) “I shall take a early opportunity of mentioning it to the board, Mrs. Mann.” (He drew it towards him.) “You feel as a mother, Mrs. Mann.” (He stirred the gin-and-water.) “I—I drink your health with cheerfulness, Mrs. Mann”; and he swallowed half of it.
domestication: “嗯，”邦布尔先生满意地说，“你说得对，你做不到。曼太太，你是个心地善良的女人。”（她放下酒杯。）“我会找个合适的机会跟董事会说的，曼太太。”（他把杯子拉近自己。）“你就像个母亲一样感同身受，曼太太。”（他搅了搅杜松子酒和水。）“我——我干杯也很高兴，曼太太。”说完，他一口气喝了半杯。
foreignization: “不”；邦布尔先生赞同地说；“不，你不能。你是一个仁慈的女人，曼太太。”（她把玻璃杯放下。）“我会尽早向董事会提起这件事，曼太太。”（他把杯子拉向自己。）“你像一位母亲一样感受，曼太太。”（他搅拌着杜松子酒和水。）“我——我愉快地敬你的健康，曼太太”；说完他喝了一半。

source: “Meat, ma’am, meat,” replied Bumble, with stern emphasis. “You’ve overfed him, ma’am. You’ve raised a artificial soul and spirit in him, ma’am unbecoming a person of his condition: as the board, Mrs. Sowerberry, who are practical philosophers, will tell you. What have paupers to do with soul or spirit? It’s quite enough that we let ’em have live bodies. If you had kept the boy on gruel, ma’am, this would never have happened.”
domestication: “肉，夫人，就是肉。”邦布尔先生严肃地强调道。“您把他喂得太饱了，夫人。您在他身上养成了不符合他身份的虚荣心和傲气，这可是板子上的那些实用哲学家们——索尔贝瑞夫人，您懂的——会告诉您的。穷人要灵魂和精神做什么？我们让他们有活命的身体就足够了。要是您让那孩子一直喝稀粥，夫人，这种事根本就不会发生。”

source: “You couldn’t find the spot to which these people had repaired,” said Monks, “but where friendship fails, hatred will often force a way. My mother found it, after a year of cunning search—ay, and found the child.”
domestication: 你找不到那些人藏身的地方，”蒙克斯说，“但俗话说得好，情谊不成恨意来。我母亲费尽心机，终于在一年后找到了那个地方——没错，也找到了那个孩子。
foreignization: “你找不到这些人藏身的地方，”蒙克斯说，“但友谊做不到的事，仇恨往往能开辟道路。我母亲在一年的狡猾搜寻之后找到了那个地方——是的，还找到了那个孩子。”

source: “A nice person to prefer a charge against a poor boy!” said Fang, with a comical effort to look humane. “I consider, sir, that you have obtained possession of that book, under very suspicious and disreputable circumstances; and you may think yourself very fortunate that the owner of the property declines to prosecute. Let this be a lesson to you, my man, or the law will overtake you yet. The boy is discharged. Clear the office!”
domestication: 方某人装出一副仁慈的模样，逗趣地说：“你这人可真好心，竟告一个穷孩子！”“我得说，先生，您这本书的来历可真是可疑又不光彩；您该庆幸这书的主人没追究。小伙子，这次就算了，不过你得记住了，不然法律早晚得找上你。现在，这孩子可以走了，都散了吧！”
foreignization: “好心人竟然要控告一个可怜的男孩！”方说，努力装出一副仁慈的样子。“我认为，先生，您是在非常可疑和不名誉的情况下得到了那本书；您应该感到非常幸运，财产的主人拒绝起诉。这对你是一个教训，伙计，否则法律还会追上你的。男孩被释放了。清场！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: Mr. Bumble sat in the workhouse parlour, with his eyes moodily fixed on the cheerless grate, whence, as it was summer time, no brighter gleam proceeded, than the reflection of certain sickly rays of the sun, which were sent back from its cold and shining surface. A paper fly-cage dangled from the ceiling, to which he occasionally raised his eyes in gloomy thought; and, as the heedless insects hovered round the gaudy net-work, Mr. Bumble would heave a deep sigh, while a more gloomy shadow overspread his countenance. Mr. Bumble was meditating; it might be that the insects brought to mind, some painful passage in his own past life.
domestication: 班布尔先生坐在济贫院的客厅里，阴沉着脸盯着壁炉，虽然是夏天，炉子里没有一点亮光，只有几缕病恹恹的阳光照在冰冷闪亮的炉面上，反射出一丝微弱的光芒。天花板上挂着一个纸糊的捕蝇笼，班布尔先生不时抬头望向它，陷入沉思；当那些无忧无虑的苍蝇在五彩斑斓的网笼周围盘旋时，班布尔先生会深深地叹一口气，脸上的阴霾更加浓重了。班布尔先生在冥思苦想，也许这些苍蝇让他想起了自己过去某段痛苦的经历。
foreignization: 邦布尔先生坐在济贫院的客厅里，眼睛阴郁地盯着那冷清的炉栅，由于是夏季，从那里没有发出比从其冰冷光滑的表面反射出的某些病态的阳光更明亮的光芒。一张纸做的苍蝇笼子从天花板上晃荡着，他偶尔会抬起眼睛，带着忧郁的思绪望向它；而当那些漫不经心的昆虫在色彩斑斓的网眼周围盘旋时，邦布尔先生会深深地叹息，脸上笼罩着更加阴郁的阴影。邦布尔先生正在沉思；或许这些昆虫让他想起了自己过往生活中某个痛苦的片段。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Bumble sat in the workhouse parlour, with his eyes moodily fixed on the cheerless grate, whence, as it was summer time, no brighter gleam proceeded, than the reflection of certain sickly rays of the sun, which were sent back from its cold and shining surface. A paper fly-cage dangled from the ceiling, to which he occasionally raised his eyes in gloomy thought; and, as the heedless insects hovered round the gaudy net-work, Mr. Bumble would heave a deep sigh, while a more gloomy shadow overspread his countenance. Mr. Bumble was meditating; it might be that the insects brought to mind, some painful passage in his own past life.

source: Oliver’s sobs checked his utterance for some minutes; when he was on the point of beginning to relate how he had been brought up at the farm, and carried to the workhouse by Mr. Bumble, a peculiarly impatient little double-knock was heard at the street-door: and the servant, running upstairs, announced Mr. Grimwig.
domestication: 奥利弗抽泣了好几分钟，话都说不出来。正当他准备讲述自己在农场里的生活，以及被邦布尔先生送到济贫院的经历时，街上大门外传来一阵不耐烦的双敲声。仆人跑上楼来，通报说格里姆威格先生到了。
foreignization: 奥利弗的啜泣抑制了他的言语好几分钟；当他正要开始讲述他是如何在农场被抚养长大，并被邦布尔先生带到济贫院的，突然听到街门传来一阵特别不耐烦的双重敲门声：仆人跑上楼来，宣布格林威格先生到了。

source: The old lady dropped a curtsey. The doctor, after tasting the cool stuff, and expressing a qualified approval of it, hurried away: his boots creaking in a very important and wealthy manner as he went downstairs.
domestication: 老太婆行了个屈膝礼。医生尝了那清凉的东西后，勉强表示了认可，然后急匆匆地走了，下楼时，他那双靴子发出的声响显得他既重要又富有。
foreignization: 老太太屈膝行礼。医生尝了尝那凉爽的东西，并表示有限度的赞赏后，匆匆离开了：他的靴子在下楼时发出了非常重要和富有的声音。

source: She was bending eagerly over the woman to hear her reply; but drew back, instinctively, as she once again rose, slowly and stiffly, into a sitting posture; then, clutching the coverlid with both hands, muttered some indistinct sounds in her throat, and fell lifeless on the bed.
domestication: 她急切地俯身倾听妇人的回答；可当妇人再次缓慢而僵硬地坐起身时，她本能地往后退了退；接着，妇人双手紧紧抓住被子，喉咙里发出些含糊不清的声音，便一下子毫无生气地倒在了床上。
foreignization: 她急切地弯下腰去听那女人的回答；但当那女人又一次缓慢而僵硬地坐起身时，她本能地退缩了；然后，用双手抓住被子，喉咙里发出一些模糊的声音，然后无力地倒在了床上。

She was bending eagerly over the woman to hear her reply; but drew back, instinctively, as she once again rose, slowly and stiffly, into a sitting posture; then, clutching the coverlid with both hands, muttered some indistinct sounds in her throat, and fell lifeless on the bed.
她急切地弯下腰去听那女人的回答；但当那女人又一次缓慢而僵硬地坐起身时，她本能地退缩了；然后，用双手抓住被子，喉咙里发出一些模糊的声音，然后无力地倒在了床上。

source: “I wish to go back,” said the girl. “I must go back, because—how can I tell such things to an innocent lady like you?—because among the men I have told you of, there is one: the most desperate among them all; that I can’t leave: no, not even to be saved from the life I am leading now.”
domestication: 女孩说：“我想回去。”“我必须回去，因为——像你这么纯洁的姑娘，我怎么能说得出口呢？——在那些男人中，有一个人，他是最无可救药的；我不能离开他：不，哪怕是为了逃离我现在的生活，我也不能离开他。”
foreignization: “我希望回去，”女孩说。“我必须回去，因为——我怎么能告诉像您这样纯洁的女士呢？——因为在那些我对您提到的男人中，有一个人：他是其中最绝望的一个；我不能离开他：不，即使是为了摆脱我现在的生活也不行。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“I wish to go back,” said the girl. “I must go back, because—how can I tell such things to an innocent lady like you?—because among the men I have told you of, there is one: the most desperate among them all; that I can’t leave: no, not even to be saved from the life I am leading now.”
女孩说：“我想回去。”“我必须回去，因为——像你这么纯洁的姑娘，我怎么能说得出口呢？——在那些男人中，有一个人，他是最无可救药的；我不能离开他：不，哪怕是为了逃离我现在的生活，我也不能离开他。”

“I wish to go back,” said the girl. “I must go back, because—how can I tell such things to an innocent lady like you?—because among the men I have told you of, there is one: the most desperate among them all; that I can’t leave: no, not even to be saved from the life I am leading now.”
“我希望回去，”女孩说。“我必须回去，因为——我怎么能告诉像您这样纯洁的女士呢？——因为在那些我对您提到的男人中，有一个人：他是其中最绝望的一个；我不能离开他：不，即使是为了摆脱我现在的生活也不行。”

source: For a long time after it was ushered into this world of sorrow and trouble, by the parish surgeon, it remained a matter of considerable doubt whether the child would survive to bear any name at all; in which case it is somewhat more than probable that these memoirs would never have appeared; or, if they had, that being comprised within a couple of pages, they would have possessed the inestimable merit of being the most concise and faithful specimen of biography, extant in the literature of any age or country.
domestication: 这孩子刚由教区的外科医生带到这个充满忧愁和苦难的世界后，很长一段时间里，大伙儿都怀疑这小生命能不能活下来，甚至能不能有机会取个名字；要是真没挺过来，那这些回忆录也就不会面世了；就算写出来了，也不过就是两页纸的事儿，倒也能算是史上最简洁、最真实的传记了，古今中外的文学作品里都找不出第二个。
foreignization: 在教区外科医生将它带入这个充满悲伤和麻烦的世界后很长一段时间里，这个孩子能否存活下来以至能够拥有任何名字，仍然是一件相当令人怀疑的事情；在这种情况下，这些回忆录很可能根本不会出现；或者即使出现了，内容也只占两三页，却具备了无价的优点，成为现存的任何时代或国家文学中最简明扼要且忠实的传记范例。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

For a long time after it was ushered into this world of sorrow and trouble, by the parish surgeon, it remained a matter of considerable doubt whether the child would survive to bear any name at all; in which case it is somewhat more than probable that these memoirs would never have appeared; or, if they had, that being comprised within a couple of pages, they would have possessed the inestimable merit of being the most concise and faithful specimen of biography, extant in the literature of any age or country.
这孩子刚由教区的外科医生带到这个充满忧愁和苦难的世界后，很长一段时间里，大伙儿都怀疑这小生命能不能活下来，甚至能不能有机会取个名字；要是真没挺过来，那这些回忆录也就不会面世了；就算写出来了，也不过就是两页纸的事儿，倒也能算是史上最简洁、最真实的传记了，古今中外的文学作品里都找不出第二个。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

For a long time after it was ushered into this world of sorrow and trouble, by the parish surgeon, it remained a matter of considerable doubt whether the child would survive to bear any name at all; in which case it is somewhat more than probable that these memoirs would never have appeared; or, if they had, that being comprised within a couple of pages, they would have possessed the inestimable merit of being the most concise and faithful specimen of biography, extant in the literature of any age or country.
在教区外科医生将它带入这个充满悲伤和麻烦的世界后很长一段时间里，这个孩子能否存活下来以至能够拥有任何名字，仍然是一件相当令人怀疑的事情；在这种情况下，这些回忆录很可能根本不会出现；或者即使出现了，内容也只占两三页，却具备了无价的优点，成为现存的任何时代或国家文学中最简明扼要且忠实的传记范例。

source: “It’s all bought up as fast as it can be made,” said the fellow. “There are fourteen water-mills, six steam-engines, and a galvanic battery, always a-working upon it, and they can’t make it fast enough, though the men work so hard that they die off, and the widows is pensioned directly, with twenty pound a-year for each of the children, and a premium of fifty for twins. One penny a square! Two half-pence is all the same, and four farthings is received with joy. One penny a square! Wine-stains, fruit-stains, beer-stains, water-stains, paint-stains, pitch-stains, mud-stains, blood-stains! Here is a stain upon the hat of a gentleman in company, that I’ll take clean out, before he can order me a pint of ale.”
domestication: “东西一生产出来就被抢购一空。”那人说。有十四座水磨坊、六台蒸汽机和一组电镀设备日夜不停地运作，可还是供不应求。工人们干得拼命，累死累活的，结果都累死了。厂主立马给寡妇发抚恤金，每个孩子每年二十镑，双胞胎还能多拿五十镑。一分钱一平方！两半便士也行，四个四分之一便士更受欢迎。一分钱一平方！红酒渍、果汁渍、啤酒渍、水渍、油漆渍、柏油渍、泥渍、血渍！这儿有个绅士帽子上的污渍，我能在他点上一杯啤酒之前就给它洗掉。
foreignization: “一做好就全买光了，”那人说道。“有十四座水磨、六台蒸汽机和一组伏打电池一直在加工它，还是供不应求，尽管工人们工作如此辛苦以至于他们死去，寡妇们立即获得抚恤金，每个孩子每年二十英镑，双胞胎还有五十英镑的奖金。一便士一平方！两个半便士也一样，四个四分之一便士也会欣然接受。一便士一平方！酒渍、果汁渍、啤酒渍、水渍、油漆渍、柏油渍、泥渍、血渍！这里有一位先生帽子上的污渍，我可以在他点一杯啤酒之前把它彻底清除干净。”

Translate the following text to Chinese.

One penny a square! Two half-pence is all the same, and four farthings is received with joy. One penny a square! Wine-stains, fruit-stains, beer-stains, water-stains, paint-stains, pitch-stains, mud-stains, blood-stains! Here is a stain upon the hat of a gentleman in company, that I’ll take clean out, before he can order me a pint of ale.”

source: The liberality of Mrs. Sowerberry to Oliver, had consisted of a profuse bestowal upon him of all the dirty odds and ends which nobody else would eat; so there was a great deal of meekness and self-devotion in her voluntarily remaining under Mr. Bumble’s heavy accusation, of which, to do her justice, she was wholly innocent, in thought, word, or deed.
domestication: 索尔伯里的太太对奥利弗的大方，无非就是把别人不愿意吃的各种剩饭残羹一股脑儿都给了他；所以她心甘情愿地承受邦布尔先生对她那严厉的指责，其实她无论是心里想的、嘴上说的还是手上做的，都跟那些罪名毫无干系，这倒真是难为她了。
foreignization: 索耶太太对奥利弗的慷慨，仅限于将所有其他人不愿意吃的食物残渣大量地赐予他；因此，她自愿承受布姆布尔先生对她严厉的指责，而事实上她在思想、言语或行为上都是完全无辜的，这表现出了极大的谦卑和自我牺牲。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The liberality of Mrs. Sowerberry to Oliver, had consisted of a profuse bestowal upon him of all the dirty odds and ends which nobody else would eat; so there was a great deal of meekness and self-devotion in her voluntarily remaining under Mr. Bumble’s heavy accusation, of which, to do her justice, she was wholly innocent, in thought, word, or deed.
索尔伯里的太太对奥利弗的大方，无非就是把别人不愿意吃的各种剩饭残羹一股脑儿都给了他；所以她心甘情愿地承受邦布尔先生对她那严厉的指责，其实她无论是心里想的、嘴上说的还是手上做的，都跟那些罪名毫无干系，这倒真是难为她了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The liberality of Mrs. Sowerberry to Oliver, had consisted of a profuse bestowal upon him of all the dirty odds and ends which nobody else would eat; so there was a great deal of meekness and self-devotion in her voluntarily remaining under Mr. Bumble’s heavy accusation, of which, to do her justice, she was wholly innocent, in thought, word, or deed.
索耶太太对奥利弗的慷慨，仅限于将所有其他人不愿意吃的食物残渣大量地赐予他；因此，她自愿承受布姆布尔先生对她严厉的指责，而事实上她在思想、言语或行为上都是完全无辜的，这表现出了极大的谦卑和自我牺牲。

source: “My mother,” said Monks, in a louder tone, “did what a woman should have done. She burnt this will. The letter never reached its destination; but that, and other proofs, she kept, in case they ever tried to lie away the blot. The girl’s father had the truth from her with every aggravation that her violent hate—I love her for it now—could add. Goaded by shame and dishonour he fled with his children into a remote corner of Wales, changing his very name that his friends might never know of his retreat; and here, no great while afterwards, he was found dead in his bed. The girl had left her home, in secret, some weeks before; he had searched for her, on foot, in every town and village near; it was on the night when he returned home, assured that she had destroyed herself, to hide her shame and his, that his old heart broke.”
domestication: “我母亲，”蒙克斯提高声音说道，“做了女人该做的事。她烧毁了这份遗嘱。信件没能送到目的地，但她保留了信件和其他证据，以防他们试图掩盖丑闻。女孩的父亲从她那里得知了真相，加上她满腔的仇恨——我现在还挺佩服她的——能加上的难听的话都加了。他被羞耻和屈辱逼得无路可走，带着孩子们逃到了威尔士的一个偏僻角落，连名字都改了，不让朋友知道他的去向。没过多久，他就被人发现死在了床上。那女孩早在几周前就悄悄离家出走了；他徒步在附近的城镇和村庄里四处寻找她；就在他回家的那个晚上，确信她已经自杀以掩盖自己的羞耻和他的耻辱时，他那颗苍老的心终于承受不住，碎了。”
foreignization: “我母亲，”蒙克斯提高声音说，“做了女人应该做的事。她烧毁了这份遗嘱。信从未到达目的地；但她保留了这些和其他证据，以防他们试图抹去污点。女孩的父亲从她那里得知了真相，以及她那激烈的仇恨——我现在爱她——所能增添的所有罪责。在羞辱和耻辱的驱使下，他带着孩子们逃到了威尔士的一个偏僻角落，甚至改了名字，以免朋友们知道他的藏身之处；就在这里，不久之后，他在床上被发现死亡。女孩几周前秘密离开了家；他曾徒步在附近每一个城镇和村庄寻找她；正是在他回家的那个晚上，确信她已自尽以掩盖她的耻辱和他的耻辱时，他的老心脏破裂了。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“My mother,” said Monks, in a louder tone, “did what a woman should have done. She burnt this will. The letter never reached its destination; but that, and other proofs, she kept, in case they ever tried to lie away the blot. The girl’s father had the truth from her with every aggravation that her violent hate—I love her for it now—could add. Goaded by shame and dishonour he fled with his children into a remote corner of Wales, changing his very name that his friends might never know of his retreat; and here, no great while afterwards, he was found dead in his bed. The girl had left her home, in secret, some weeks before; he had searched for her, on foot, in every town and village near; it was on the night when he returned home, assured that she had destroyed herself, to hide her shame and his, that his old heart broke.”

“我母亲，”蒙克斯提高声音说道，“做了女人该做的事。她烧毁了这份遗嘱。信件没能送到目的地，但她保留了信件和其他证据，以防他们试图掩盖丑闻。女孩的父亲从她那里得知了真相，加上她满腔的仇恨——我现在还挺佩服她的——能加上的难听的话都加了。他被羞耻和屈辱逼得无路可走，带着孩子们逃到了威尔士的一个偏僻角落，连名字都改了，不让朋友知道他的去向。没过多久，他就被人发现死在了床上。那女孩早在几周前就悄悄离家出走了；他徒步在附近的城镇和村庄里四处寻找她；就在他回家的那个晚上，确信她已经自杀以掩盖自己的羞耻和他的耻辱时，他那颗苍老的心终于承受不住，碎了。”

source: This was an antic fellow, half pedlar and half mountebank, who travelled about the country on foot to vend hones, strops, razors, washballs, harness-paste, medicine for dogs and horses, cheap perfumery, cosmetics, and such-like wares, which he carried in a case slung to his back. His entrance was the signal for various homely jokes with the countrymen, which slackened not until he had made his supper, and opened his box of treasures, when he ingeniously contrived to unite business with amusement.
domestication: 这人是个半商半艺的滑头，背着个箱子四处走乡串户，卖些刀片、磨刀皮、剃须刀、肥皂球、马具光亮剂、狗马药、便宜香水、化妆品之类的杂货。他一进门，乡亲们就开始拿他打趣，直到他吃过晚饭，打开那装满宝贝的箱子，才开始正经做起买卖来，不过他总能巧妙地把生意和娱乐结合在一起。
foreignization: 这是一个半商贩半江湖艺人的滑稽家伙，他徒步走遍全国，贩卖刀片、磨刀皮带、剃须刀、洗面球、马具膏、狗马药物、廉价香水、化妆品等商品，这些货物都装在一个背在身后的箱子里。他的到来成了乡下人开各种乡土玩笑的信号，这种玩笑一直持续到他吃过晚饭，并打开他的宝物箱时才停止，这时他巧妙地将生意与娱乐结合在一起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This was an antic fellow, half pedlar and half mountebank, who travelled about the country on foot to vend hones, strops, razors, washballs, harness-paste, medicine for dogs and horses, cheap perfumery, cosmetics, and such-like wares, which he carried in a case slung to his back. His entrance was the signal for various homely jokes with the countrymen, which slackened not until he had made his supper, and opened his box of treasures, when he ingeniously contrived to unite business with amusement.
这人是个半商半艺的滑头，背着个箱子四处走乡串户，卖些刀片、磨刀皮、剃须刀、肥皂球、马具光亮剂、狗马药、便宜香水、化妆品之类的杂货。他一进门，乡亲们就开始拿他打趣，直到他吃过晚饭，打开那装满宝贝的箱子，才开始正经做起买卖来，不过他总能巧妙地把生意和娱乐结合在一起。

This was an antic fellow, half pedlar and half mountebank, who travelled about the country on foot to vend hones, strops, razors, washballs, harness-paste, medicine for dogs and horses, cheap perfumery, cosmetics, and such-like wares, which he carried in a case slung to his back. His entrance was the signal for various homely jokes with the countrymen, which slackened not until he had made his supper, and opened his box of treasures, when he ingeniously contrived to unite business with amusement.
这是一个半商贩半江湖艺人的滑稽家伙，他徒步走遍全国，贩卖刀片、磨刀皮带、剃须刀、洗面球、马具膏、狗马药物、廉价香水、化妆品等商品，这些货物都装在一个背在身后的箱子里。他的到来成了乡下人开各种乡土玩笑的信号，这种玩笑一直持续到他吃过晚饭，并打开他的宝物箱时才停止，这时他巧妙地将生意与娱乐结合在一起。

source: “Stop thief! Stop thief!” There is a passion for hunting something deeply implanted in the human breast. One wretched breathless child, panting with exhaustion; terror in his looks; agony in his eyes; large drops of perspiration streaming down his face; strains every nerve to make head upon his pursuers; and as they follow on his track, and gain upon him every instant, they hail his decreasing strength with joy. “Stop thief!” Ay, stop him for God’s sake, were it only in mercy!
domestication: “抓贼啊！抓贼啊！”人心深处总有一种追捕的激情。一个可怜的孩子，气喘吁吁，累得快要断气；脸上满是恐惧，眼中尽是痛苦；大颗大颗的汗珠顺着脸颊往下淌；他拼命地挣扎，想摆脱身后的追捕者。而那些人紧追不舍，每时每刻都在逼近他，对他的体力不支感到欣喜若狂。“抓贼啊！”是啊，看在老天的份上，哪怕是为了慈悲，也得把他拦下来！
foreignization: “抓小偷！抓小偷！”人类心中深处有一种狩猎的激情。一个可怜的、气喘吁吁的孩子，因疲惫而喘息；脸上带着恐惧；眼中充满痛苦；大颗的汗珠从脸上流下；他竭尽全力试图摆脱追捕者；而当他们紧随其后，并且每时每刻都在接近他时，他们以他的体力逐渐不支而感到高兴。“抓小偷！”是的，看在上帝的份上，哪怕是为了慈悲，也请拦住他！

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Stop thief! Stop thief!” There is a passion for hunting something deeply implanted in the human breast. One wretched breathless child, panting with exhaustion; terror in his looks; agony in his eyes; large drops of perspiration streaming down his face; strains every nerve to make head upon his pursuers; and as they follow on his track, and gain upon him every instant, they hail his decreasing strength with joy. “Stop thief!” Ay, stop him for God’s sake, were it only in mercy!
“抓贼啊！抓贼啊！”人心深处总有一种追捕的激情。一个可怜的孩子，气喘吁吁，累得快要断气；脸上满是恐惧，眼中尽是痛苦；大颗大颗的汗珠顺着脸颊往下淌；他拼命地挣扎，想摆脱身后的追捕者。而那些人紧追不舍，每时每刻都在逼近他，对他的体力不支感到欣喜若狂。“抓贼啊！”是啊，看在老天的份上，哪怕是为了慈悲，也得把他拦下来！

“Stop thief! Stop thief!” There is a passion for hunting something deeply implanted in the human breast. One wretched breathless child, panting with exhaustion; terror in his looks; agony in his eyes; large drops of perspiration streaming down his face; strains every nerve to make head upon his pursuers; and as they follow on his track, and gain upon him every instant, they hail his decreasing strength with joy. “Stop thief!” Ay, stop him for God’s sake, were it only in mercy!
“抓小偷！抓小偷！”人类心中深处有一种狩猎的激情。一个可怜的、气喘吁吁的孩子，因疲惫而喘息；脸上带着恐惧；眼中充满痛苦；大颗的汗珠从脸上流下；他竭尽全力试图摆脱追捕者；而当他们紧随其后，并且每时每刻都在接近他时，他们以他的体力逐渐不支而感到高兴。“抓小偷！”是的，看在上帝的份上，哪怕是为了慈悲，也请拦住他！

source: “I suppose, a married man,” replied Mr. Bumble, shading his eyes with his hand, and surveying the stranger, from head to foot, in evident perplexity, “is not more averse to turning an honest penny when he can, than a single one. Porochial officers are not so well paid that they can afford to refuse any little extra fee, when it comes to them in a civil and proper manner.”
domestication: “我猜，结了婚的男人，”邦布尔先生说着，用手遮住眼睛，从头到脚打量着这个陌生人，一脸困惑，“也不会比单身汉更不愿意赚点儿外快吧。教区的差事工资不高，哪儿能拒绝人家规规矩矩送来的额外好处呢。”

source: “That’s acause they damped the straw afore they lit it in the chimbley to make ’em come down again,” said Gamfield; “that’s all smoke, and no blaze; vereas smoke ain’t o’ no use at all in making a boy come down, for it only sinds him to sleep, and that’s wot he likes. Boys is wery obstinit, and wery lazy, Gen’l’men, and there’s nothink like a good hot blaze to make ’em come down vith a run. It’s humane too, gen’l’men, acause, even if they’ve stuck in the chimbley, roasting their feet makes ’em struggle to hextricate theirselves.”
domestication: 这是因为他们在烟囱里点火之前，先用水把草弄湿了，好让那些孩子下来。”甘菲尔德说，“这样就只有烟，没有火苗。可光有烟是没什么用的，因为烟只会让孩子昏昏欲睡，而这正是他们想要的。孩子们非常顽固，又很懒，先生们，要想让他们飞快地下来，就得用大火来烤。这方法还很人道呢，先生们，因为就算他们卡在烟囱里，脚被烤得烫，也会拼命挣扎着出来。”
foreignization: “那是因为他们在烟囱里点火之前把稻草弄湿了，让那些孩子下来，”甘菲尔德说，“全是烟，没有火苗；而烟根本没用，因为只会让孩子昏昏欲睡，而这正是他们喜欢的。孩子们非常固执，非常懒惰，先生们，没有什么比炽热的火更能让他们飞快地下来了。这也很人道，先生们，因为即使他们卡在烟囱里，烤他们的脚也会让他们挣扎着解脱自己。”

source: Those dreadful walls of Newgate, which have hidden so much misery and such unspeakable anguish, not only from the eyes, but, too often, and too long, from the thoughts, of men, never held so dread a spectacle as that. The few who lingered as they passed, and wondered what the man was doing who was to be hanged tomorrow, would have slept but ill that night, if they could have seen him.
domestication: 新门监狱那可怕的墙，藏匿了多少苦难和难以言说的痛苦，不仅遮住了人们的眼睛，还常常长时间地蒙蔽了人们的心。可它从未囚禁过如此令人胆寒的景象。那些路过时驻足片刻，猜测明日将要被绞死的人在做什么的人，要是能看到他此时的样子，只怕那一夜都难以入眠。
foreignization: 那些可怕的纽盖特监狱的墙，不仅遮蔽了人们的视线，也常常和长时间地遮蔽了人们的思绪，使他们看不见里面隐藏着如此多的苦难和无法言喻的痛苦，从未像那次那样展示过如此可怕的景象。那些走过时逗留片刻、好奇明天要被绞死的人在做什么的人，如果能看到他的话，那一晚肯定睡不好觉。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Those dreadful walls of Newgate, which have hidden so much misery and such unspeakable anguish, not only from the eyes, but, too often, and too long, from the thoughts, of men, never held so dread a spectacle as that. The few who lingered as they passed, and wondered what the man was doing who was to be hanged tomorrow, would have slept but ill that night, if they could have seen him.

source: Having replaced these trinkets, the Jew took out another: so small that it lay in the palm of his hand. There seemed to be some very minute inscription on it; for the Jew laid it flat upon the table, and shading it with his hand, pored over it, long and earnestly. At length he put it down, as if despairing of success; and, leaning back in his chair, muttered:

source: As fate would have it, Mrs. Bedwin chanced to bring in, at this moment, a small parcel of books, which Mr. Brownlow had that morning purchased of the identical bookstall-keeper, who has already figured in this history; having laid them on the table, she prepared to leave the room.
domestication: 说来也巧，贝德温夫人这时恰好拿着一小包书进来了，这些书是布朗洛先生今天早上从那个已经在故事里出现过的书摊老板那儿买来的。她把书放在桌子上，准备离开房间。
foreignization: 正如命运所安排的那样，贝德温太太恰好在这时带来了一个小包裹的书，这些书是布朗洛先生那天早上从已经在本故事中出现过的那个书摊摊主那里买来的；她把这些书放在桌子上后，准备离开房间。

As fate would have it, Mrs. Bedwin chanced to bring in, at this moment, a small parcel of books, which Mr. Brownlow had that morning purchased of the identical bookstall-keeper, who has already figured in this history; having laid them on the table, she prepared to leave the room.

source: Mrs. Corney shook her head mournfully, as if deploring the mental blindness of those paupers who did not know it; and thrusting a silver spoon (private property) into the inmost recesses of a two-ounce tin tea-caddy, proceeded to make the tea.
domestication: 科尼太太摇着头，一脸的无奈，仿佛在感叹那些穷人的糊涂，居然不明白这番好意；她拿出一把银勺子（这是她的私人物品），伸进一个二盎司的小茶叶罐里，开始泡茶。
foreignization: 科尼太太悲伤地摇了摇头，仿佛在为那些不知情的贫民感到遗憾；然后她把一只银茶匙（私人财产）伸进一个两盎司的茶叶盒最深处，开始泡茶。

source: Oliver roused himself, and made his best obeisance. He had been wondering, with his eyes fixed on the magistrates’ powder, whether all boards were born with that white stuff on their heads, and were boards from thenceforth on that account.
domestication: 奥利弗打起精神，鞠了个最深的躬。他刚才一直盯着法官们的白粉头，心里琢磨着，是不是所有委员生下来头上就带着这白东西，所以才当上了委员。
foreignization: 奥利弗振作精神，鞠了个最深的躬。他一直盯着治安法官们的扑面粉发呆，想着所有董事会成员是不是一生下来头上就有那层白色的东西，因此才成了董事会成员。

source: “Well,” said the doctor, “you are a queer fellow. But of course they will get you into parliament at the election before Christmas, and these sudden shiftings and changes are no bad preparation for political life. There’s something in that. Good training is always desirable, whether the race be for place, cup, or sweepstakes.”
domestication: 医生说道：“你这人还真够古怪的。不过圣诞节前的选举，你肯定能顺利进入议会，这种突然的变动和转变，其实对政治生活来说是个不错的准备。这话有点道理。不管是为了争个职位、奖杯还是奖金，好的训练总是有用的。”
foreignization: “呣，”医生说，“你是个怪人。但当然他们会在圣诞节前的选举中让你进入议会，这些突然的变动和变化对政治生活来说不是什么坏事。这里面有点道理。无论是为了职位、奖杯还是抽奖，良好的训练总是可取的。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Well,” said the doctor, “you are a queer fellow. But of course they will get you into parliament at the election before Christmas, and these sudden shiftings and changes are no bad preparation for political life. There’s something in that. Good training is always desirable, whether the race be for place, cup, or sweepstakes.”

source: But, these were the mere wanderings of a mind unable wholly to detach itself from old companions and associations, though enabled to fix itself steadily on one object, and resolved not to be turned aside by any consideration. Her fears for Sikes would have been more powerful inducements to recoil while there was yet time; but she had stipulated that her secret should be rigidly kept, she had dropped no clue which could lead to his discovery, she had refused, even for his sake, a refuge from all the guilt and wretchedness that encompasses her—and what more could she do! She was resolved.
domestication: 但是，这些都是她心里的念旧之情在作祟，尽管她能一心一意地专注于目标，下定决心不被任何事情动摇。要是早些时候，她对西克斯的担忧可能会成为让她退缩的强大动力；但她已经要求严守秘密，没有留下任何线索可以追查到他，甚至为了他的安全，拒绝了逃离所有罪恶和痛苦的机会——她还能做什么呢！她已经下定了决心。
foreignization: 但是，这些只是她那无法完全脱离旧日伙伴和联系的心灵的漫游，尽管她能够坚定地专注于一个目标，并决心不被任何因素动摇。她对西克斯的担忧本可以成为更强大的退缩动机，只要还有时间；但她已经要求严格保守秘密，没有留下任何可能导向他被发现的线索，甚至为了他的缘故，她也拒绝了一个可以让她远离所有罪恶和痛苦的避难所——她还能做什么！她已下定决心。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, these were the mere wanderings of a mind unable wholly to detach itself from old companions and associations, though enabled to fix itself steadily on one object, and resolved not to be turned aside by any consideration. Her fears for Sikes would have been more powerful inducements to recoil while there was yet time; but she had stipulated that her secret should be rigidly kept, she had dropped no clue which could lead to his discovery, she had refused, even for his sake, a refuge from all the guilt and wretchedness that encompasses her—and what more could she do! She was resolved.
但是，这些都是她心里的念旧之情在作祟，尽管她能一心一意地专注于目标，下定决心不被任何事情动摇。要是早些时候，她对西克斯的担忧可能会成为让她退缩的强大动力；但她已经要求严守秘密，没有留下任何线索可以追查到他，甚至为了他的安全，拒绝了逃离所有罪恶和痛苦的机会——她还能做什么呢！她已经下定了决心。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, these were the mere wanderings of a mind unable wholly to detach itself from old companions and associations, though enabled to fix itself steadily on one object, and resolved not to be turned aside by any consideration. Her fears for Sikes would have been more powerful inducements to recoil while there was yet time; but she had stipulated that her secret should be rigidly kept, she had dropped no clue which could lead to his discovery, she had refused, even for his sake, a refuge from all the guilt and wretchedness that encompasses her—and what more could she do! She was resolved.
但是，这些只是她那无法完全脱离旧日伙伴和联系的心灵的漫游，尽管她能够坚定地专注于一个目标，并决心不被任何因素动摇。她对西克斯的担忧本可以成为更强大的退缩动机，只要还有时间；但她已经要求严格保守秘密，没有留下任何可能导向他被发现的线索，甚至为了他的缘故，她也拒绝了一个可以让她远离所有罪恶和痛苦的避难所——她还能做什么！她已下定决心。

source: As Mr. Gamfield did happen to labour under the slight imputation of having bruised three or four boys to death already, it occurred to him that the board had, perhaps, in some unaccountable freak, taken it into their heads that this extraneous circumstance ought to influence their proceedings. It was very unlike their general mode of doing business, if they had; but still, as he had no particular wish to revive the rumour, he twisted his cap in his hands, and walked slowly from the table.
domestication: 甘菲尔德先生本来就背负着把三四个孩子打死了的坏名声，他琢磨着，董事会可能是脑袋一热，觉得这事儿应该影响他们的决定。这可不像是他们平时做事的风格，但话说回来，他也不想让这事儿再闹得沸沸扬扬，于是他就捻着手里的帽子，磨磨蹭蹭地从桌边挪开了。
foreignization: 由于加姆菲尔德先生碰巧已经因为打死了三四个男孩而受到轻微的指责，他想到董事会或许心血来潮，认为这个外来的情况应该影响他们的决定。如果真是这样，这与他们通常办事的方式非常不符；但是，尽管如此，他并没有特别想让这个谣言再传开，于是他用手扭着帽子，慢慢离开了桌子。

source: “Silence!” said the old gentleman, feigning an anger he was far from feeling. “Never let me hear the boy’s name again. I rang to tell you that. Never. Never, on any pretence, mind! You may leave the room, Mrs. Bedwin. Remember! I am in earnest.”
domestication: “闭嘴！”老先生假装生气地说，其实心里根本没这回事。“我再也不要听到这小子的名字了。我就是来告诉你这个的。永远不要，你听清楚了！不管有什么借口都不行！毕德温太太，你可以出去了。记住了！我是说真的。”
foreignization: “安静！”老先生说道，假装出他其实并不存在的愤怒。“我再也不想听到这男孩的名字。我打电话就是为了告诉你这件事。永远不要再提，无论任何借口，记住！贝德温太太，你可以离开了。记住！我是认真的。”

source: The old gentleman bowed respectfully; and advancing to the magistrate’s desk, said, suiting the action to the word, “That is my name and address, sir.” He then withdrew a pace or two; and, with another polite and gentlemanly inclination of the head, waited to be questioned.

foreignization: 老先生恭敬地鞠了一躬；然后走到县官的桌子前，边说边做动作，“那是我的姓名和住址，大人。” 说完，他后退了一两步；接着，又礼貌而绅士地点头致意，等待着被询问。

source: She clutched the matron by the arm, and forcing her into a chair by the bedside, was about to speak, when looking round, she caught sight of the two old women bending forward in the attitude of eager listeners.
domestication: 她一把抓住了那妇人的胳膊，硬是把她按在了床边的椅子上，正要开口说话，却忽然看到那两个老太婆凑上前，一副洗耳恭听的样子。

source: The nearest voices took up the cry, and hundreds echoed it. Some called for ladders, some for sledge-hammers; some ran with torches to and fro as if to seek them, and still came back and roared again; some spent their breath in impotent curses and execrations; some pressed forward with the ecstasy of madmen, and thus impeded the progress of those below; some among the boldest attempted to climb up by the water-spout and crevices in the wall; and all waved to and fro, in the darkness beneath, like a field of corn moved by an angry wind: and joined from time to time in one loud furious roar.
domestication: 附近的人都跟着喊了起来，成百上千的人声此起彼伏。有的要梯子，有的要大锤；有人举着火把跑来跑去，好像在找东西，可转了一圈又回来了，继续吼叫；有的人咒骂不已，却无济于事；有的人像疯了一样往前挤，反而挡住了后面人的路；最胆大的几个试着顺着排水管和墙缝往上爬；所有人像被狂风卷动的麦田，在黑暗中摇曳不定，不时发出震耳欲聋的怒吼。
foreignization: 最近的声音接过了呼喊，数百人随之响应。有些人要求梯子，有些人要求大锤；有些人拿着火把来回奔跑，仿佛在寻找这些东西，然后又回来再次吼叫；有些人则徒劳地咒骂和诅咒；有些人像疯子一样狂热地向前挤，阻碍了下方的人的前进；一些最勇敢的人试图通过水管和墙上的裂缝攀爬上去；所有人在黑暗中像被愤怒的风卷动的麦田一样摇摆不定，并不时发出震耳欲聋的狂怒吼声。

source: By a remarkable coincidence, the other two had been visited with the same unpleasant sensation at that precise moment. It was quite obvious, therefore, that it was the gate; especially as there was no doubt regarding the time at which the change had taken place, because all three remembered that they had come in sight of the robbers at the instant of its occurance.
domestication: 真是巧了，另外两个人在那一刻也感到了同样的不痛快。这下子很明显了，问题出在那扇门上；再说，事情发生的时间大家记得清清楚楚，三个人都记得，正是他们看见强盗的那一瞬间。
foreignization: 由于一个奇妙的巧合，另外两个人在同一刻也感受到了同样的不愉快感觉。因此，很明显，那是因为大门；特别是因为三个人都记得他们是在这一变化发生的一刹那看到强盗的，所以关于这一时间没有疑问。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

By a remarkable coincidence, the other two had been visited with the same unpleasant sensation at that precise moment. It was quite obvious, therefore, that it was the gate; especially as there was no doubt regarding the time at which the change had taken place, because all three remembered that they had come in sight of the robbers at the instant of its occurance.
真是巧了，另外两个人在那一刻也感到了同样的不痛快。这下子很明显了，问题出在那扇门上；再说，事情发生的时间大家记得清清楚楚，三个人都记得，正是他们看见强盗的那一瞬间。

messages_foreignization.content:

By a remarkable coincidence, the other two had been visited with the same unpleasant sensation at that precise moment. It was quite obvious, therefore, that it was the gate; especially as there was no doubt regarding the time at which the change had taken place, because all three remembered that they had come in sight of the robbers at the instant of its occurance.
由于一个奇妙的巧合，另外两个人在同一刻也感受到了同样的不愉快感觉。因此，很明显，那是因为大门；特别是因为三个人都记得他们是在这一变化发生的一刹那看到强盗的，所以关于这一时间没有疑问。

source: Harry Maylie looked as if he could have followed up this short dialogue by one or two remarks that would have staggered the doctor not a little; but he contented himself with saying, “We shall see,” and pursued the subject no farther. The post-chaise drove up to the door shortly afterwards; and Giles coming in for the luggage, the good doctor bustled out, to see it packed.
domestication: 哈利·梅利看起来像是还能再讲几句，足以让医生大吃一惊；但他只说了句“咱们走着瞧”，便不再多言。没过多久，马车停在了门口，吉尔斯进来拿行李，好心的医生忙前忙后，亲自监督打包。
foreignization: 哈里·梅利看起来似乎可以接着这段简短的对话发表一两个会让医生大吃一惊的评论；但他只满足于说了一句“我们会看到的”，并没有再继续这个话题。不久之后，马车驶到了门前；吉尔斯进来取行李时，好心的医生忙忙碌碌地出去，看着行李装车。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Harry Maylie looked as if he could have followed up this short dialogue by one or two remarks that would have staggered the doctor not a little; but he contented himself with saying, “We shall see,” and pursued the subject no farther. The post-chaise drove up to the door shortly afterwards; and Giles coming in for the luggage, the good doctor bustled out, to see it packed.

messages_foreignization.content:

Harry Maylie looked as if he could have followed up this short dialogue by one or two remarks that would have staggered the doctor not a little; but he contented himself with saying, “We shall see,” and pursued the subject no farther. The post-chaise drove up to the door shortly afterwards; and Giles coming in for the luggage, the good doctor bustled out, to see it packed.
哈里·梅利看起来似乎可以接着这段简短的对话发表一两个会让医生大吃一惊的评论；但他只满足于说了一句“我们会看到的”，并没有再继续这个话题。不久之后，马车驶到了门前；吉尔斯进来取行李时，好心的医生忙忙碌碌地出去，看着行李装车。

source: “Yes. Betwixt you and me, ma’am,” returned Mr. Bumble, “that’s the great principle; and that’s the reason why, if you look at any cases that get into them owdacious newspapers, you’ll always observe that sick families have been relieved with slices of cheese. That’s the rule now, Mrs. Corney, all over the country. But, however,” said the beadle, stopping to unpack his bundle, “these are official secrets, ma’am; not to be spoken of; except, as I may say, among the porochial officers, such as ourselves. This is the port wine, ma’am, that the board ordered for the infirmary; real, fresh, genuine port wine; only out of the cask this forenoon; clear as a bell, and no sediment!”
domestication: 好嘞。我跟您说啊，夫人，这可是大原则；也正因为这个道理，要是您瞧见那些报纸上登的啥案件，保准能见到生病的家庭都是用奶酪片来救济的。现在啊，全国各地都是这么个规矩。不过嘛，这些可是机密，夫人，不能往外传，除非是像咱们这样的教区职员之间私下里聊聊。这瓶就是董事会给济贫院订的波特酒；真货，新鲜又地道；今儿上午刚从桶里打出来的；清澈透亮，连点沉淀都没有！
foreignization: “是的，班布尔先生回答说，“在您和我之间，夫人，”这是个大原则；这也是为什么，如果您看看那些登在那些大胆的报纸上的案例，您会发现贫困的家庭总是用奶酪片来救济。现在，科尼太太，这是全国通行的规则。但是，不管怎样，”执事停了下来解开他的包裹，“这些是官方的秘密，夫人；不能随便说的；除非像我们这样的教区官员之间可以谈谈。这是董事会为医院订购的波特酒，夫人；真正的、新鲜的、纯正的波特酒；今天上午刚从桶里取出来的；清澈如钟声，没有一点沉淀物！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Yes. Betwixt you and me, ma’am,” returned Mr. Bumble, “that’s the great principle; and that’s the reason why, if you look at any cases that get into them owdacious newspapers, you’ll always observe that sick families have been relieved with slices of cheese. That’s the rule now, Mrs. Corney, all over the country. But, however,” said the beadle, stopping to unpack his bundle, “these are official secrets, ma’am; not to be spoken of; except, as I may say, among the porochial officers, such as ourselves. This is the port wine, ma’am, that the board ordered for the infirmary; real, fresh, genuine port wine; only out of the cask this forenoon; clear as a bell, and no sediment!”
好嘞。我跟您说啊，夫人，这可是大原则；也正因为这个道理，要是您瞧见那些报纸上登的啥案件，保准能见到生病的家庭都是用奶酪片来救济的。现在啊，全国各地都是这么个规矩。不过嘛，这些可是机密，夫人，不能往外传，除非是像咱们这样的教区职员之间私下里聊聊。这瓶就是董事会给济贫院订的波特酒；真货，新鲜又地道；今儿上午刚从桶里打出来的；清澈透亮，连点沉淀都没有！

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Yes. Betwixt you and me, ma’am,” returned Mr. Bumble, “that’s the great principle; and that’s the reason why, if you look at any cases that get into them owdacious newspapers, you’ll always observe that sick families have been relieved with slices of cheese. That’s the rule now, Mrs. Corney, all over the country. But, however,” said the beadle, stopping to unpack his bundle, “these are official secrets, ma’am; not to be spoken of; except, as I may say, among the porochial officers, such as ourselves. This is the port wine, ma’am, that the board ordered for the infirmary; real, fresh, genuine port wine; only out of the cask this forenoon; clear as a bell, and no sediment!”

“是的，班布尔先生回答说，“在您和我之间，夫人，”这是个大原则；这也是为什么，如果您看看那些登在那些大胆的报纸上的案例，您会发现贫困的家庭总是用奶酪片来救济。现在，科尼太太，这是全国通行的规则。但是，不管怎样，”执事停了下来解开他的包裹，“这些是官方的秘密，夫人；不能随便说的；除非像我们这样的教区官员之间可以谈谈。这是董事会为医院订购的波特酒，夫人；真正的、新鲜的、纯正的波特酒；今天上午刚从桶里取出来的；清澈如钟声，没有一点沉淀物！”

source: After some discussion, in which all three took an active part, it was decided that Nancy should repair to the Jew’s next evening when the night had set in, and bring Oliver away with her; Fagin craftily observing, that, if he evinced any disinclination to the task, he would be more willing to accompany the girl who had so recently interfered in his behalf, than anybody else. It was also solemnly arranged that poor Oliver should, for the purposes of the contemplated expedition, be unreservedly consigned to the care and custody of Mr. William Sikes; and further, that the said Sikes should deal with him as he thought fit; and should not be held responsible by the Jew for any mischance or evil that might be necessary to visit him: it being understood that, to render the compact in this respect binding, any representations made by Mr. Sikes on his return should be required to be confirmed and corroborated, in all important particulars, by the testimony of flash Toby Crackit.
domestication: 经过一番讨论，三人都积极参与，最后决定让南希在第二天晚上夜深人静时去犹太人的住处，把奥利弗带出来；费金狡猾地说，如果奥利弗对这个任务有所抵触，他或许更愿意跟着刚帮过他的那个女孩走，而不会跟其他人走。大家还郑重其事地商量好，为了即将进行的行动顺利，可怜的奥利弗将完全交给威廉·赛克斯先生照管；并且，赛克斯先生可以随意处置奥利弗，万一发生任何不幸或坏事，犹太人也不会追究赛克斯的责任：这条件要生效，得等赛克斯回来后，他说的情况由托比·克拉基特证实和佐证，特别是重要的细节。
foreignization: 经过一番讨论，三人都积极参与其中，最终决定南希应在次日晚上夜幕降临时前往犹太人的住处，将奥利弗带走；费金狡诈地指出，如果他对这项任务表现出任何不情愿，他可能会更愿意与那个最近曾为他出面的女孩一起走，而不愿跟任何人走。还庄严地商定，为了计划中的行动，可怜的奥利弗应毫无保留地交由威廉·赛克斯先生照管；此外，这位赛克斯先生应可以自行处理奥利弗，并且对于可能必须降临到他身上的任何不幸或恶行，犹太人不应追究赛克斯的责任：这一点上要使协议具有约束力，需要赛克斯先生回来后所作的任何陈述，都必须在所有重要细节上得到“机灵”托比·克雷基特的证实和佐证。

It was also solemnly arranged that poor Oliver should, for the purposes of the contemplated expedition, be unreservedly consigned to the care and custody of Mr. William Sikes; and further, that the said Sikes should deal with him as he thought fit; and should not be held responsible by the Jew for any mischance or evil that might be necessary to visit him: it being understood that, to render the compact in this respect binding, any representations made by Mr. Sikes on his return should be required to be confirmed and corroborated, in all important particulars, by the testimony of flash Toby Crackit.

source: “The tide,” cried the murderer, as he staggered back into the room, and shut the faces out, “the tide was in as I came up. Give me a rope, a long rope. They’re all in front. I may drop into the Folly Ditch, and clear off that way. Give me a rope, or I shall do three more murders and kill myself.”
domestication: “潮水来了，”凶手喊道，他摇摇晃晃地退回房间，关上了门，把外面的脸孔隔在外面，“潮水涨起来了，我上来的时候正好赶上。给我一根绳子，长一点的。他们都守在前面。我可以从傻瓜沟跳下去，然后逃走。快给我绳子，不然我再杀三个人，然后自杀。”

source: “I don’t mean a regular mute to attend grown-up people, my dear, but only for children’s practice. It would be very new to have a mute in proportion, my dear. You may depend upon it, it would have a superb effect.”
domestication: 亲爱的，我不是说要雇个普通哑巴来伺候大人，而是专门为孩子们准备的。有个按比例制作的小哑巴，这可是新鲜事儿。你放心，效果绝对好得不得了。

source: “He can’t live a week, the doctor says,” pursued Mr. Bumble. “He is the master of this establishment; his death will cause a wacancy; that wacancy must be filled up. Oh, Mrs. Corney, what a prospect this opens! What a opportunity for a jining of hearts and housekeepings!”
domestication: “他说这人活不过一个星期了，”邦布尔先生接着说。“他是这家济贫院的当家；他一死，就会空出个位子；这个位子总得有人来补上。哦，科尼太太，你看看，这不是天赐良机吗？这可是两颗心和两个家合二为一的大好机会啊！”
foreignization: “医生说他活不过一个星期，”邦布尔先生接着说。“他是这所机构的主人；他的死会造成一个空缺；这个空缺必须填补。哦，科尼太太，这开辟了多么美好的前景！这是多么好的一个心灵和家务结合的机会！”
